name: A2
description: Elementary — Common vocabulary for simple situations

words.definition: The second day of the week, after Sunday.
words.definitionUz: Monday — haftaning ikkinchi kuni, yakshanbadan keyingi kun.
words.example1: I have English class every Monday.
words.example1Translation: Men har dushanba ingliz tili darsiga boraman.
words.example2: Monday is usually a busy day at work.
words.example2Translation: Dushanba odatda ishda band kun bo‘ladi.
words.example3: We start the new project on Monday.
extraExamples: She feels tired on Monday mornings.
Monday is the first workday of the week.
I go to the gym every Monday evening.
The shop is closed on Monday.
He has a meeting every Monday.
We clean the house on Mondays.
extraExampleTranslations: U dushanba ertalablarida charchaganini his qiladi.
Men har dushanba oqshomida sport zaliga boraman.

words.definition: The third day of the week, after Monday.
words.definitionUz: Tuesday — haftaning uchinchi kuni, dushanbadan keyingi kun.
words.example1: We have a meeting every Tuesday.
words.example2: Tuesday is my favorite day for sports.
words.example2Translation: Seshanba mening sport uchun sevimli kunim.
extraExamples: I have piano lessons on Tuesday.
The market is open on Tuesday.
Tuesday is a good day to start new things.
We have pizza every Tuesday night.
The library is less crowded on Tuesday.
extraExampleTranslations: Seshanba yangi ishlarni boshlash uchun yaxshi kun.
Biz har seshanba kechasi pitsa yeymiz.

words.definition: The fourth day of the week, in the middle of the week.
words.definitionUz: Wednesday — haftaning to‘rtinchi kuni, hafta o‘rtasidagi kun.
words.example1: We have a test on Wednesday.
words.example2: Wednesday is the middle of the work week.
words.example3: She visits her grandparents every Wednesday.
words.example3Translation: U har chorshanba bobosi va buvisinikiga boradi.
extraExamples: Wednesday feels like a long day.
The shop has a special offer on Wednesday.
We clean the office every Wednesday.
He has a dentist appointment on Wednesday.
Wednesday is often the busiest day.
extraExampleTranslations: Chorshanba ko‘pincha eng band kun bo‘ladi.

words.definition: The fifth day of the week, after Wednesday.
words.definitionUz: Thursday — haftaning beshinchi kuni, chorshanbadan keyingi kun.
words.example1: We have a team meeting every Thursday.
words.example1Translation: Biz har payshanba jamoa yig‘ilishini o‘tkazamiz.
words.example3: She goes to yoga class on Thursdays.
extraExamples: I do my grocery shopping on Thursday.
The movie night is on Thursday.
He has a doctor appointment on Thursday.
The market is very busy on Thursday.

words.definition: The sixth day of the week, before the weekend.
words.definitionUz: Friday — haftaning oltinchi kuni, dam olish kunlaridan oldingi kun.
words.example1: Many people feel happy on Friday.
words.example2: We have a short day at work on Friday.
words.example3: She goes out with friends every Friday night.
words.example3Translation: U har juma oqshomida do‘stlari bilan chiqadi.
extraExamples: Friday is the last workday of the week.
I clean my room on Fridays.
The weekend starts on Friday evening.
Friday prayers are important for Muslims.
Many shops have sales on Friday.
We watch movies on Friday nights.
extraExampleTranslations: Dam olish kuni juma oqshomidan boshlanadi.
Ko‘p do‘konlarda juma kunlari aksiya bo‘ladi.

words.definition: The seventh day of the week, part of the weekend.
words.definitionUz: Saturday — haftaning yettinchi kuni, dam olish kunlaridan biri.
words.example1: We go to the park every Saturday.
words.example3: She does housework on Saturday morning.
words.example3Translation: U shanba ertalab uy ishlarini qiladi.
extraExamples: Many shops are open on Saturday.
The market is very busy on Saturday.
Saturday is a good day to relax.
We clean the house on Saturday.
extraExampleTranslations: Shanba dam olish uchun yaxshi kun.

words.definition: The first day of the week, a day of rest.
words.definitionUz: Sunday — haftaning birinchi kuni, dam olish kuni.
words.example1: We have family dinner every Sunday.
words.example1Translation: Biz har yakshanba oilaviy kechki ovqat qilamiz.
words.example3: The shop is closed on Sunday.
extraExamples: Sunday is the last day of the weekend.
We go to the cinema on Sundays.
She prepares meals for the week on Sunday.
Many people go to church on Sunday.
I review my week on Sunday evening.
extraExampleTranslations: U yakshanba butun haftaga ovqat tayyorlaydi.
Men yakshanba oqshomida haftani ko‘rib chiqaman.

words.definition: The first month of the year.
words.definitionUz: January — yilning birinchi oyi.
words.example1: It is very cold in January.
words.example3: We start school again in January.
extraExamples: Many people make resolutions in January.
It snows a lot in January.
January is the beginning of the year.
Prices are often lower in January.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p odamlar yanvarda yangi qarorlar qabul qilishadi.

words.definition: The second month of the year.
words.definitionUz: February — yilning ikkinchi oyi.
words.example1: February has 28 or 29 days.
words.example3: It is still cold in February.
extraExamples: We celebrate spring in late February.
The weather starts to improve in February.
He has a holiday in February.

words.definition: The third month of the year.
words.definitionUz: March — yilning uchinchi oyi.
words.example1: Spring starts in March.
words.example2: My brother was born in March.
words.example3: The weather gets warmer in March.
extraExamples: It can rain a lot in March.
The new school term starts in March.
She has a trip planned for March.
Many countries celebrate holidays in March.

words.definition: The fourth month of the year.
words.definitionUz: April — yilning to‘rtinchi oyi.
words.example1: April is often rainy.
words.example2: We celebrate Navruz in late March and early April.
words.example2Translation: Biz Navro‘zni mart oxiri va aprel boshida nishonlaymiz.
extraExamples: April Fools' Day is on April 1st.
The weather is unpredictable in April.
Many babies are born in April.
Spring is in full swing in April.

words.definition: The sixth month of the year.
words.definitionUz: June — yilning oltinchi oyi.
words.example1: School ends in June.
words.example2: It is very hot in June.
words.example3: We go on vacation in June.
extraExamples: The days are long in June.
She celebrates her birthday in June.
June is a popular month for travel.

words.definition: The seventh month of the year.
words.definitionUz: July — yilning yettinchi oyi.
words.example1: It is the hottest month in July.
words.example2: We celebrate Independence Day in July.
words.example3: Many people take vacation in July.
extraExamples: The beaches are crowded in July.
We have a family trip in July.

words.definition: The eighth month of the year.
words.definitionUz: August — yilning sakkizinchi oyi.
words.example1: Many students return to school in August.
words.example2: It is still very hot in August.
words.example2Translation: Avgustda hali ham juda issiq bo‘ladi.
extraExamples: The city is quiet in August.
Many people take vacation in August.
August is the last month of summer.
We have a festival in August.

words.definition: The ninth month of the year.
words.definitionUz: September — yilning to‘qqizinchi oyi.
words.example1: School starts again in September.
words.example2: The weather becomes cooler in September.
words.example3: September is a good month for studying.
extraExamples: Many new students arrive in September.
The leaves change color in September.
She has a birthday in September.
We go back to work in September.

words.definition: The tenth month of the year.
words.definitionUz: October — yilning o‘ninchi oyi.
words.example1: October is famous for Halloween.
words.example2: The weather is nice in October.
extraExamples: We celebrate Teacher's Day in October.
October is a beautiful autumn month.

words.definition: The eleventh month of the year.
words.definitionUz: November — yilning o‘n birinchi oyi.
words.example1: November can be quite cold.
words.example3: We prepare for winter in November.
extraExamples: The days get shorter in November.
Many people feel sad in November.
We celebrate Independence Day in November.

words.definition: The twelfth and last month of the year.
words.definitionUz: December — yilning o‘n ikkinchi va oxirgi oyi.
words.example1: December is a festive month.
words.example2: It snows a lot in December.
words.example3: We celebrate New Year in December.
extraExamples: The shops are very busy in December.
We have a big family dinner in December.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz dekabrda katta oilaviy kechki ovqat qilamiz.

words.definition: The season between winter and summer when flowers bloom.
words.definitionUz: Spring — qish va yoz orasidagi fasl, gullarning ochiladigan vaqti.
words.example1: Flowers bloom in spring.
words.example2: The weather is warm in spring.
extraExamples: It rains a lot in spring.
The days get longer in spring.

words.definition: The hottest season of the year.
words.definitionUz: Summer — yilning eng issiq fasli.
words.example1: We go to the beach in summer.
words.example3: Children have long vacation in summer.
words.example3Translation: Bolalar yozda uzun ta’tilga ega bo‘lishadi.
extraExamples: Summer is the best time for travel.
It is very hot in summer.
We eat ice cream in summer.
She wears light clothes in summer.
extraExampleTranslations: Yoz sayohat uchun eng yaxshi vaqt.

words.definition: The season between summer and winter when leaves fall.
words.definitionUz: Autumn — yoz va qish orasidagi fasl, barglar to‘kiladigan vaqt.
words.example1: Leaves turn yellow in autumn.
extraExamples: We wear warm clothes in autumn.
The air is fresh in autumn.

words.definition: The coldest season of the year.
words.definitionUz: Winter — yilning eng sovuq fasli.
words.example1: It snows a lot in winter.
words.example2: We wear warm coats in winter.
extraExamples: The days are short in winter.
We celebrate New Year in winter.
Winter is a time for hot drinks.

words.definition: One of the four main parts of the year: spring, summer, autumn, winter.
words.definitionUz: Season — yilning to‘rtta asosiy fasllaridan biri: bahor, yoz, kuz, qish.
words.example1: Which season do you like best?
words.example2: Each season has its own beauty.
words.example2Translation: Har bir faslning o‘z go‘zalligi bor.
extraExamples: There are four seasons in a year.
The football season starts in autumn.
The harvest season is in autumn.

words.definition: Any day from Monday to Friday.
words.definitionUz: Weekday — dushanbadan jumagacha bo‘lgan ish kunlari.
words.example1: I work on weekdays.
words.example2: The traffic is heavy on weekdays.
extraExamples: Public transport is crowded on weekdays.
I relax on weekends, not weekdays.
Many offices close early on Fridays.
extraExampleTranslations: Men dam olish kunlarida dam olaman, ish kunlarida emas.
Ko‘p ofislar juma kunlari erta yopiladi.

words.definition: A special day when most people do not work.
words.definitionUz: Public holiday — ko‘pchilik ishlamaydigan maxsus kun.
words.example1: We have a public holiday next week.
words.example2: Banks are closed on public holidays.
extraExamples: There are many public holidays in Uzbekistan.
Shops have sales on public holidays.
Public holidays are good for rest.
The office is closed on public holidays.
extraExampleTranslations: Davlat bayramlari dam olish uchun yaxshi.

words.definition: To stop sleeping and become conscious.
words.definitionUz: Wake up — uxlab yotgan holdan uyg‘onib turishni bildiradi.
words.example1: I wake up at 7 o'clock every morning.
words.example1Translation: Men har kuni ertalab soat 7 da uyg‘onaman.
words.example3: What time do you usually wake up?
extraExamples: I wake up early on weekdays.
He woke up with a headache.
Wake up! It's time for school.
We woke up to the sound of birds.

words.definition: To rise from bed after waking up.
words.definitionUz: Get up — uyg‘ongandan keyin yotoqdan turishni bildiradi.
words.example1: I get up at 7:30 every morning.
words.example1Translation: Men har kuni ertalab soat 7:30 da o‘rnimdan turaman.
words.example2: She got up quickly when the alarm rang.
words.example2Translation: U signal chalganda tez o‘rnidan turdi.
words.example3: It's hard to get up early in winter.
extraExamples: He gets up at 6 AM for work.
She always gets up before everyone.
We got up early for the trip.
He got up and made coffee.
Try to get up at the same time every day.
extraExampleTranslations: U ishi uchun soat 6 da turadi.
U har doim boshqalardan oldin turadi.
Har kuni bir vaqtda turishga harakat qiling.

words.definition: To clean your teeth with a toothbrush.
words.definitionUz: Brush teeth — tish cho‘tkasi bilan tishlarni tozalashni bildiradi.
words.example1: I brush my teeth twice a day.
words.example1Translation: Men kuniga ikki marta tish yuvaman.
words.example2: Brush your teeth before going to bed.
words.example3: Children should learn to brush teeth properly.
words.example3Translation: Bolalar tishlarini to‘g‘ri yuvishni o‘rganishlari kerak.
extraExamples: Don't forget to brush your teeth.
She brushes her teeth after every meal.
Use toothpaste when you brush teeth.
He brushes his teeth for two minutes.
We teach kids to brush teeth.
I brush my teeth in the morning and at night.
extraExampleTranslations: U har ovqatdan keyin tish yuvadi.
Men ertalab va kechqurun tish yuvaman.

words.definition: To wash your body under running water.
words.definitionUz: Take a shower — oqayotgan suv ostida tanani yuvishni bildiradi.
words.example1: I take a shower every morning.
words.example1Translation: Men har kuni ertalab dush qabul qilaman.
words.example2: She takes a shower after exercise.
words.example2Translation: U sportdan keyin dush qabul qiladi.
words.example3: Do you prefer taking a shower or a bath?
words.example3Translation: Siz dush qabul qilishni yoki vannada yotishni afzal ko‘rasizmi?
extraExamples: Take a shower before going out.
I like taking a hot shower in winter.
She takes a shower twice a day.
Taking a shower helps you feel fresh.
We don't have time to take a shower now.
Take a cold shower to wake up.
extraExampleTranslations: Tashqariga chiqishdan oldin dush qabul qiling.
Qishda issiq dush qabul qilishni yaxshi ko‘raman.
U kuniga ikki marta dush qabul qiladi.
Dush qabul qilish sizni yangidek his qilishga yordam beradi.
Hozir dush qabul qilishga vaqtimiz yo‘q.
Uyg‘onish uchun sovuq dush qabul qiling.

words.definition: To put on clothes.
words.definitionUz: Get dressed — kiyimlarni kiyib tayyorlanishni bildiradi.
words.example1: I get dressed quickly in the morning.
words.example2: She got dressed for the party.
extraExamples: He gets dressed in formal clothes for work.
Children learn to get dressed by themselves.
I get dressed after taking a shower.
She got dressed in five minutes.
Get dressed warmly, it's cold outside.
We got dressed for the wedding.
extraExampleTranslations: U ish uchun rasmiy kiyim kiyadi.
U har doim ozoda kiyinib oladi.

words.definition: To arrange the sheets and blankets on the bed neatly.
words.definitionUz: Make bed — to‘shakni choyshab va ko‘rpalar bilan tartibga solib yasash.
words.example1: I make my bed every morning.
words.example1Translation: Men har kuni ertalab to‘shagimni yasayman.
words.example2: She made the bed before leaving.
words.example2Translation: U ketishdan oldin to‘shakni yasab qo‘ydi.
words.example3: Making bed is a good habit.
extraExamples: He forgot to make his bed.
Children should learn to make their beds.
I make the bed after waking up.
The room looks better when the bed is made.
She makes the bed every day.
Making bed takes only two minutes.
extraExampleTranslations: To‘shak yasashga atigi ikki daqiqa ketadi.

words.definition: To clean and organize a room.
words.definitionUz: Tidy room — xonani tozalab, narsalarni o‘z joyiga qo‘yish.
words.example1: I tidy my room every weekend.
words.example1Translation: Men har dam olish kunida xonamni tartibga solaman.
words.example2: She tidied her room before guests arrived.
words.example2Translation: U mehmonlar kelishidan oldin xonasini tartibga soldi.
extraExamples: He doesn't like tidying his room.
A tidy room helps you focus.
She tidies her room every morning.
Tidy room is a good habit.
extraExampleTranslations: Tartibli xona diqqatni jamlaganga yordam beradi.
U har kuni ertalab xonasini tartibga soladi.

words.definition: To complete schoolwork at home.
words.definitionUz: Do homework — maktab vazifalarini uyda bajarish.
words.example1: I do my homework after school.
words.example1Translation: Men maktabdan kelgach uy vazifasini bajaraman.
words.example2: She does homework in the evening.
words.example3: Don't forget to do your homework.
extraExamples: He does homework with his friend.
We have a lot of homework today.
The teacher checks homework every day.
I do homework in my room.
extraExampleTranslations: U uy vazifasini do‘sti bilan bajaradi.
O‘qituvchi har kuni uy vazifasini tekshiradi.

words.definition: To look at television programs.
words.definitionUz: Watch TV — televizor orqali dasturlarni tomosha qilish.
words.example1: I watch TV in the evening.
words.example2: She watches TV after finishing homework.
words.example2Translation: U uy vazifasini tugatgach televizor ko‘radi.
extraExamples: We watch TV together as a family.
He watches TV news every morning.
I don't watch TV on weekdays.
Turn off the TV and go to bed.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz oila bo‘lib birga televizor ko‘ramiz.
U har kuni ertalab yangiliklarni ko‘radi.
Televizor ko‘rish dam olishga yordam berishi mumkin.

words.definition: To go to sleep; to lie down in bed.
words.definitionUz: Go to bed — uxlagani yotoqqa yotishni bildiradi.
words.example1: I go to bed at 11 PM.
words.example2: Children should go to bed early.
words.example3: She goes to bed after reading a book.
words.example3Translation: U kitob o‘qigandan keyin uxlagani yotadi.
extraExamples: What time do you go to bed?
Don't go to bed too late.
He goes to bed early on weekdays.
We go to bed after dinner.
She went to bed feeling tired.
I like to go to bed with a smile.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz kechki ovqatdan keyin uxlagani yotamiz.
Men tabassum bilan uxlagani yotishni yaxshi ko‘raman.

words.definition: A regular way of doing things every day.
words.definitionUz: Routine — har kuni bir xil tarzda bajariladigan ishlar tartibi.
words.example1: I have a healthy daily routine.
words.example3: She follows the same routine every day.
words.example3Translation: U har kuni bir xil tartibga rioya qiladi.
extraExamples: A good routine helps you stay organized.
Change your routine to feel better.
extraExampleTranslations: Yaxshi kun tartibi tartibli bo‘lishga yordam beradi.
O‘zingizni yaxshi his qilish uchun kun tartibingizni o‘zgartiring.

words.definition: Something you do regularly, often without thinking.
words.definitionUz: Habit — odatda o‘ylamasdan muntazam bajariladigan ish.
words.example1: Reading before bed is a good habit.
words.example1Translation: Uxlagandan oldin kitob o‘qish yaxshi odat.
words.example2: He has a bad habit of biting his nails.
words.example2Translation: Uning tirnoq chaqish yomon odati bor.
extraExamples: She is trying to break bad habits.
Drinking water is an important habit.
Morning habits set the tone for the day.
He has the habit of waking up early.
extraExampleTranslations: U yomon odatlardan voz kechishga urinmoqda.

words.definition: Full of energy and enthusiasm.
words.definitionUz: Energetic — energiya va g‘ayratga to‘la, quvnoq.
words.example1: She is very energetic in the morning.
words.example2: The children are energetic after playing.
words.example3Translation: U sportdan keyin o‘zini quvnoq his qiladi.
extraExamples: The teacher is energetic and fun.
I feel more energetic in spring.
The team was energetic and motivated.
He is energetic despite his age.

words.definition: To rest and become less tense or worried.
words.definitionUz: Relax — dam olish va tashvishdan ozod bo‘lish.
words.example1: I like to relax by reading a book.
words.example1Translation: Men kitob o‘qib dam olishni yaxshi ko‘raman.
words.example3: Let's relax after a hard day.
extraExamples: He relaxes by taking a walk.
It is important to relax every day.
extraExampleTranslations: U dam olish kunlarida dam oladi.
Yoga menga dam olishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Physical activity to keep the body healthy.
words.definitionUz: Exercise — tanani sog‘lom saqlash uchun jismoniy mashqlar.
words.example1: I exercise every morning.
words.example1Translation: Men har kuni ertalab sport bilan shug‘ullanaman.
words.example2: Regular exercise is good for health.
extraExampleTranslations: Har kuni 30 daqiqa sport bilan shug‘ullaning.
U sport bilan shug‘ullanib sog‘lom qoladi.

words.definition: to return to one's house
words.definitionUz: O'z uyiga qaytib kelish
words.example1: I come home at 6 pm every day.
words.example1Translation: Men har kuni soat 18:00 da uyga kelaman.
extraExamples: The children came home from school.
I can't wait to come home.

words.definition: to attend school
words.definitionUz: Maktabga o'qishga borish
words.example1: I go to school by bus.
words.example2: She goes to school every day.
words.example3: The children go to school at 8 o'clock.
extraExamples: Do you go to school on foot?
He doesn't like going to school.
She goes to a big school.
They go to school by car.

words.definition: to go to one's workplace
words.definitionUz: Ish joyiga borish
words.example1: I go to work at 7:30.
words.example2: She goes to work by metro.
words.example3: He doesn't go to work today.
extraExamples: What time do you go to work?
I go to work every day.
He goes to work by bike.
I don't want to go to work.

words.definition: to eat the first meal of the day
words.definitionUz: Kunining birinchi ovqatini yeyish
words.example1: I have breakfast at 7 o'clock.
words.example2: She has breakfast with her family.
words.example3: What do you have for breakfast?
extraExamples: I don't have breakfast every day.

words.definition: to eat the midday meal
words.definitionUz: Kun o'rtasidagi ovqatni yeyish
words.example1: We have lunch at 1 pm.
words.example2: She has lunch at the office.
words.example3: What did you have for lunch?

words.definition: to eat the evening meal
words.definitionUz: Kechqurun ovqat yeyish
words.example1: We have dinner at 8 pm.
words.example1Translation: Biz soat 20:00 da kechki ovqat qilamiz.
words.example2: She has dinner with her family.
words.example2Translation: U oilasi bilan kechki ovqat qiladi.

words.definition: to clean one's hands with water and soap
words.definitionUz: Qo'llarni suv va sovun bilan tozalash
words.example1: Always wash hands before eating.
words.example1Translation: Ovqatdan oldin har doim qo'llarni yuving.
words.example3: She washed her hands after playing.
extraExamples: The doctor said to wash hands often.

words.definition: a card used to buy things and pay later
words.definitionUz: Narsalarni sotib olib, keyin to'lash uchun ishlatiladigan karta
words.example1: I paid with my credit card.
extraExampleTranslations: Kredit karta olish uchun ariza bering.

words.definition: a document showing proof of purchase
words.definitionUz: Sotib olinganligini tasdiqlovchi hujjat
words.example1: Keep the receipt.
extraExamples: The receipt is in the bag.

words.definition: to be the right size; suitable
words.definitionUz: To'g'ri o'lchamda bo'lish; mos kelish
words.example1: These shoes don't fit.
extraExamples: Try it on to see if it fits.
Does it fit in the bag?
extraExampleTranslations: U yugurish bilan sportchi bo'lib qoladi.
Bu ish menga juda mos keladi.

words.definition: to put on clothes to check if they fit
words.definitionUz: Kiyimni kiyib, mos kelishini tekshirish
words.example1: Can I try this on?
words.example3: Try on the shoes before buying.
words.example3Translation: Sotib olishdan oldin tuflilarni kiyib ko'ring.
extraExamples: Try it on in the fitting room.
extraExampleTranslations: Sotib olishdan oldin har doim kiyib ko'ring.

words.definition: a period when goods are sold at lower prices
words.definitionUz: Narxlar pasaytirilgan savdo davri
words.example1: The shoes are on sale.
words.example2: I bought it during the sale.
words.example2Translation: Men buni aktsiya paytida sotib oldim.

words.definition: a reduction in price
words.definitionUz: Narxning pasaytirilishi
words.example1: There is a 20% discount.
words.example2: I got a discount on this shirt.

words.definition: a person who buys goods or services
words.definitionUz: Tovar yoki xizmat sotib oluvchi odam
words.example1: The customer is always right.

words.definition: a person who helps in a shop or office
words.definitionUz: Do'kon yoki ofisda yordam beruvchi shaxs
words.example1: The shop assistant helped me.

words.definition: to have enough money to buy something
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani sotib olishga pul yetkazish
words.example1: I can't afford a new car.
words.example1Translation: Men yangi mashinaga pul yetkaza olmayman.

words.definition: a document showing how much you must pay
words.definitionUz: Qancha to'lash kerakligini ko'rsatuvchi hujjat
words.example1: Can I have the bill, please?

words.definition: a short written message
words.definitionUz: Qisqa yozilgan xabar
words.example1: She left a note on the table.
words.example3: I wrote a note to my friend.

words.definition: a small bag for money and personal items
words.definitionUz: Pul va shaxsiy buyumlar uchun kichik sumka
words.example1: She lost her purse.
words.example2: I keep money in my purse.

words.definition: popular style of clothes at a particular time
words.definitionUz: Muayyan vaqtda mashhur kiyim uslubi
words.example1: She is interested in fashion.

words.definition: a particular way of doing or designing something
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani bajarish yoki yaratishning o'ziga xos usuli
words.example1: I like her style.
words.example2: This dress has a nice style.

words.definition: a name of a product made by a company
words.definitionUz: Kompaniya tomonidan ishlab chiqarilgan mahsulot nomi
words.example1: What brand is your phone?

words.definition: how good or bad something is
words.definitionUz: Biror narsaning yaxshi yoki yomonligi
words.example1: The quality of this product is high.
words.example3: Quality is more important than quantity.

words.definition: how much of something there is
words.definitionUz: Biror narsaning qancha miqdorda ekanligi
words.example1: The quantity is not enough.

words.definition: to present something for acceptance
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani qabul qilish uchun taklif qilish
words.example1: They made a good offer.

words.definition: something bought at a very low price
words.definitionUz: Juda past narxda sotib olingan narsa
words.example1: This is a real bargain.
words.example2: I got it at a bargain price.

words.definition: a place where goods are bought and sold
words.definitionUz: Tovarlar sotib olinadigan va sotiladigan joy
words.example1: I go to the market every Saturday.
words.example3: She sells vegetables at the market.

words.definition: a place where trains or buses stop
words.definitionUz: Poyezd yoki avtobus to'xtaydigan joy
words.example1: I will meet you at the station.
words.example2: The train leaves from platform 3 at the station.
words.example3: Bus station is near the market.

words.definition: a raised area where trains stop
words.definitionUz: Poyezd to'xtaydigan baland maydon
words.example1: The train is on platform 5.

words.definition: a place where buses stop for passengers
words.definitionUz: Avtobus yo'lovchilarni tushirib-oladigan joy
words.example1: The bus stop is near my house.
extraExamples: There is no bus stop here.
The bus stop is 100 meters away.

words.definition: a railway system under the ground
words.definitionUz: Yer osti temir yo'li tizimi
words.example1: I take the underground to work.

words.definition: the way to go
words.definitionUz: Boradigan yo'l
words.example1: Can you give me directions?

words.definition: a period of time away from work or school
words.definitionUz: Ish yoki maktabdan dam olish davri
words.example1: We are going on vacation next month.

words.definition: in or to a foreign country
words.definitionUz: Xorijiy mamlakatda yoki unga
words.example1: She studies abroad.

words.definition: a large bag for carrying clothes when traveling
words.definitionUz: Sayohatda kiyimlar uchun katta sumka
words.example1: Pack your suitcase.

words.definition: bags and suitcases for traveling
words.definitionUz: Sayohat uchun sumkalar va chamadonlar
words.example1: Where is my luggage?

words.definition: to leave a place
words.definitionUz: Biror joydan ketish
words.example1: The train departs at 9 am.

words.definition: to make something happen later than planned
words.definitionUz: Rejalashtirilgan vaqtdan keyin sodir bo'lishi
words.example1: The flight is delayed.
words.example2: There is a delay of 30 minutes.

words.definition: a person who travels for pleasure
words.definitionUz: Dam olish uchun sayohat qiluvchi odam
words.example1: Many tourists visit this place.
words.example2: She is a tourist from Japan.
extraExamples: The city is full of tourists.

words.definition: a person who shows tourists around
words.definitionUz: Sayyohlarga joylarni ko'rsatuvchi odam
words.example1: The guide showed us the city.

words.definition: The activity of visiting places of interest as a tourist.
words.definitionUz: Diqqatga sazovor joylarni tomosha qilish – sayyoh sifatida qiziqarli joylarga borish faoliyati.
words.example1: We went sightseeing in the old city.
words.example1Translation: Biz eski shaharda diqqatga sazovor joylarni tomosha qildik.
words.example2: Sightseeing is my favorite part of travel.
words.example2Translation: Diqqatga sazovor joylarni tomosha qilish sayohatning eng sevimli qismidir.
words.example3: The tour includes sightseeing and shopping.
words.example3Translation: Ekskursiya diqqatga sazovor joylarni tomosha qilish va xarid qilishni o‘z ichiga oladi.
extraExamples: There are many sightseeing spots here.
The guide showed us the best sightseeing places.
extraExampleTranslations: U avtobusda diqqatga sazovor joylarni tomosha qilishni yoqtiradi.
Bu yerda ko‘p diqqatga sazovor joylar bor.
Biz kunni diqqatga sazovor joylarni tomosha qilish bilan o‘tkazdik.
Diqqatga sazovor joylarni tomosha qilish charchatishi mumkin.
Yo‘lboshchi bizga eng yaxshi joylarni ko‘rsatdi.
Kechqurun diqqatga sazovor joylarni tomosha qilish chiroyli.
Diqqatga sazovor joylarni tomosha qilish sayohatlari mashhur.

words.definition: A journey by air in an airplane.
words.definitionUz: Parvoz – samolyotda havo orqali sayohat.
words.example1: Our flight was delayed.
words.example2: The flight to London takes 5 hours.

words.definition: The process of getting on a plane, ship, or train.
words.definitionUz: Bortga chiqish – samolyot, kema yoki poyezdga chiqish jarayoni.
words.example1: Boarding starts at 9 am.

words.definition: Suitcases and bags containing personal belongings when traveling.
words.definitionUz: Yuk – sayohat paytida shaxsiy buyumlar solingan chamadon va sumkalar.
words.example1: Put your baggage on the scale.
words.example3: The baggage claim area is downstairs.

words.definition: A boat that carries people and vehicles across water.
words.definitionUz: Parom – odamlar va transport vositalarini suv orqali olib o‘tadigan kema.
words.example1: We took the ferry to the island.

words.definition: A two-wheeled vehicle with an engine.
words.definitionUz: Mototsikl – dvigatelli ikki g‘ildirakli transport vositasi.
words.example1: He rides a motorbike to work.

words.definition: The movement of vehicles on the road.
words.definitionUz: Tirbandlik – yo‘lda transport vositalarining harakati.
words.example1: There is heavy traffic today.
words.example2: Traffic is slow in the morning.

words.definition: A situation where traffic cannot move easily.
words.definitionUz: Tiqilinch – transport harakati qiyinlashgan vaziyat.
words.example1: We were stuck in a traffic jam.
words.example3: Avoid rush hour to miss the jam.
words.example3Translation: Tiqilinchdan qochish uchun qatnov vaqtini o‘tkazing.
extraExamples: The jam is on the highway.
The jam cleared after an hour.

words.definition: The way from one place to another.
words.definitionUz: Yo‘nalish – bir joydan ikkinchi joyga boradigan yo‘l.
words.example1: What is the best route?
words.example3: The route to the airport is clear.

words.definition: The place you are traveling to.
words.definitionUz: Manzil – sayohat qilayotgan joyingiz.
words.example1: Our destination is Samarkand.

words.definition: A journey to a place and back.
words.definitionUz: Sayohat – biror joyga borib qaytish.
words.example1: We planned a trip to the mountains.

words.definition: A drawing of an area showing roads, rivers, and places.
words.definitionUz: Xarita – yo‘llar, daryolar va joylarni ko‘rsatuvchi hududning chizmasi.
words.example1: Look at the map.
words.example3: She checked the map on her phone.

words.definition: The system of moving people or goods from one place to another.
words.definitionUz: Transport – odamlar yoki yuklarni bir joydan ikkinchisiga ko‘chirish tizimi.
words.example1: Public transport is convenient.

words.definition: A book or app that gives the meanings of words.
words.definitionUz: Lug‘at – so‘zlarning ma’nolarini beruvchi kitob yoki ilova.
words.example1: Look up the word in the dictionary.

words.definition: To make something better.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani yaxshiroq qilish.
words.example1: I want to improve my English.

words.definition: Something that is wrong.
words.definitionUz: Xato – noto‘g‘ri narsa.
words.example1: I made a mistake.

words.definition: Right or accurate.
words.definitionUz: To‘g‘ri yoki aniq.
words.example1: Your answer is correct.

words.definition: A child who is learning at school.
words.definitionUz: O‘quvchi – maktabda o‘qiydigan bola.
words.example1: The pupils are studying.

words.definition: A person in the same class at school.
words.definitionUz: Sinfdosh – maktabda bir sinfda o‘qiydigan shaxs.
words.example1: My classmate is very friendly.

words.definition: A list of times when events happen.
words.definitionUz: Jadval – voqealar sodir bo‘ladigan vaqtlar ro‘yxati.
words.example1: Check the school timetable.

words.definition: A set of lessons on a particular subject.
words.definitionUz: Kurs – muayyan mavzu bo‘yicha darslar to‘plami.
words.example1: I am taking an English course.

words.definition: A grade given for schoolwork.
words.definitionUz: Bahо – maktab ishi uchun beriladigan baho.
words.example1: She got a high mark.

words.definition: A planned piece of work.
words.definitionUz: Loyiha – rejalashtirilgan ish.
words.example1: We worked on a school project.

words.definition: A talk showing information to others.
words.definitionUz: Taqdimot – boshqalarga ma’lumot ko‘rsatish nutqi.
words.example1: She gave a good presentation.

words.definition: A room in a school where classes are held.
words.definitionUz: Sinf xonasi – maktabda darslar o‘tkaziladigan xona.
words.example1: The classroom is clean.

words.definition: A place of higher education after school.
words.definitionUz: Kollej – maktabdan keyingi oliy ta’lim muassasasi.
words.example1: She studies at college.

words.definition: The ability to do something well.
words.definitionUz: Ko‘nikma – biror ishni yaxshi bajarish qobiliyati.
words.example1: She has good cooking skills.

words.definition: To review and study material again before a test.
words.definitionUz: Imtihon oldidan materialni qayta ko‘rib chiqib o‘rganish.
words.example1: I need to revise for the exam.

words.definition: A place where books are kept for reading or borrowing.
words.definitionUz: Kutubxona – kitoblarni o‘qish yoki olib ketish uchun saqlanadigan joy.
words.example1: I go to the library often.

words.definition: The study of the Earth’s surface, countries, and people.
words.definitionUz: Geografiya – Yer yuzasi, mamlakatlar va odamlar haqidagi fan.
words.example1: I like geography lessons.
words.example3: Geography helps us understand the world.

words.definition: The creation of beautiful or meaningful things like painting and music.
words.definitionUz: San'at – rasm, musiqa kabi go‘zal yoki mazmunli narsalarni yaratish.
words.example1: She studies art at college.

words.definition: A system of communication used by a country or people.
words.definitionUz: Til – mamlakat yoki xalq tomonidan ishlatiladigan muloqot tizimi.
words.example1: English is an international language.
words.example3: Learning a new language is useful.

words.definition: A person you work with.
words.definitionUz: Hamkasb – birga ishlaydigan shaxs.
words.example1: My colleague helped me.
words.example3: We have a meeting with colleagues.

words.definition: To put in a lot of effort in your job or studies.
words.definitionUz: Ish yoki o‘qishda ko‘p kuch sarflash.
words.example1: You must work hard to succeed.
words.example1Translation: Muvaffaqiyatga erishish uchun qattiq ishlashingiz kerak.
words.example3: Work hard and you will get good results.
words.example3Translation: Qattiq ishlang va yaxshi natijaga erishasiz.
extraExamples: He works hard for his family.
She worked hard on the project.
extraExampleTranslations: Qattiq ishlang va qattiq dam oling.

words.definition: A period of time in the middle of the day for eating lunch and resting.
words.definitionUz: Tushlik tanaffusi – kun o‘rtasida ovqatlanish va dam olish vaqti.
words.example1: We have lunch break at 1 pm.

words.definition: A building where goods are made using machines.
words.definitionUz: Zavod – mashinalar yordamida mahsulot ishlab chiqariladigan bino.
words.example1: He works in a car factory.
words.example3: Many people work at the factory.

words.definition: To get money by working.
words.definitionUz: Ishlab pul topish.
words.example1: She earns a good salary.
words.example2: He works hard to earn money.
words.example2Translation: U pul topish uchun qattiq ishlaydi.

words.definition: Money paid regularly for work.
words.definitionUz: Maosh – ish uchun muntazam to‘lanadigan pul.
words.example1: His salary is high.
words.example2: She receives her salary every month.

words.definition: A piece of work to be done.
words.definitionUz: Vazifa – bajarilishi kerak bo‘lgan ish.
words.example1: Finish your task.

words.definition: The latest time by which something must be finished.
words.definitionUz: Muddat – biror narsani tugatish uchun oxirgi vaqt.
words.example1: The deadline is tomorrow.

words.definition: A person who works for a company or organization.
words.definitionUz: Xodim — kompaniya yoki tashkilotda ishlaydigan odam.
words.example1: The company has more than 500 employees.
words.example2: Every employee must follow the rules.
words.example2Translation: Har bir xodim qoidalarga rioya qilishi kerak.
words.example3: She is a new employee in the marketing department.
extraExamples: The manager praised the employees for their hard work.
All employees receive training every year.
The company provides benefits for its employees.
He started as a junior employee.
Employees can work from home on Fridays.
The employees celebrated the company's success.
extraExampleTranslations: Barcha xodimlar har yili o'quvdan o'tishadi.
Xodimlar juma kunlari uydan ishlashi mumkin.

words.definition: The assistance and advice provided to customers.
words.definitionUz: Mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatish — mijozlarga yordam va maslahat berish.
words.example1: The company is known for excellent customer service.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya ajoyib mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatishi bilan mashhur.
words.example2Translation: U mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatish bo'limida ishlaydi.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshi mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatish sadoqatni oshiradi.
extraExamples: Bad customer service can damage a company's reputation.
She received a complaint about customer service.
Training is important for customer service staff.
Online customer service is becoming popular.
The manager thanked the customer service team.
extraExampleTranslations: Yomon mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatish kompaniya obro'siga putur yetkazishi mumkin.
U mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatish haqida shikoyat oldi.
Mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatish xodimlarini o'qitish muhim.
Onlayn mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatish mashhur bo'lib bormoqda.
Rahbar mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatish jamoasiga rahmat aytdi.

words.definition: A detailed proposal for doing something.
words.definitionUz: Reja — biror ishni bajarish uchun batafsil taklif.
words.example1: We need a good plan for the project.
words.example2: She is planning a trip to Europe.
extraExamples: He made a plan to save money.
The teacher prepared a lesson plan.
Do you have any plans for the weekend?
Planning is the key to success.
extraExampleTranslations: Dam olish kunlari uchun biror rejangiz bormi?

words.definition: A thought or suggestion about what to do.
words.definitionUz: Fikr / g'oya — nima qilish haqidagi o'y yoki taklif.
words.example1: That's a great idea!
words.example2: She has a good idea for the project.
words.example2Translation: U loyiha uchun yaxshi g'oyaga ega.
extraExamples: I have no idea what to do.
A new idea came to her mind.
Sharing ideas is important in a team.
It was her idea to start the business.
extraExampleTranslations: Ular bir necha fikrni muhokama qilishdi.

words.definition: A difficult situation that needs to be solved.
words.definitionUz: Muammo — hal qilishni talab qiladigan qiyin vaziyat.
words.example1: We have a problem with the computer.
words.example3: Money is not the only problem.
extraExamples: He faced many problems in his career.
They discussed the problem in the meeting.
There is no easy solution to this problem.
She is good at solving problems.
extraExampleTranslations: U karyerasida ko'p muammolarga duch keldi.

words.definition: A person's professional journey and development.
words.definitionUz: Karyera — odamning kasbiy yo'li va rivojlanishi.
words.example1: She has a successful career in teaching.
words.example2: He wants to build a career in technology.
words.example3: Career progression is important for many people.
words.example3Translation: Karyera o'sishi ko'p odamlar uchun muhim.
extraExamples: Choosing a career is a big decision.
She changed her career at age 40.
He is focused on his career.
Career opportunities are better in big cities.
She has a long and impressive career.
Career advice from experts is useful.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning uzoq va ta'sirchan karyerasi bor.

words.definition: Feeling or showing surprise.
words.definitionUz: Hayron — kutilmagan holatdan hayratga tushgan holat.
words.example1: I was surprised to see him there.
words.example1Translation: Uni u yerda ko'rib hayron qoldim.
words.example2: She looked surprised when she heard the news.
words.example2Translation: U xabarni eshitganda hayron bo'lib qoldi.
words.example3: He was pleasantly surprised by the gift.
extraExamples: Everyone was surprised by the result.
She was surprised at how easy it was.
He gave her a surprised look.
The students were surprised by the test.
We were all surprised by her decision.
extraExampleTranslations: U qanchalik oson ekanligidan hayron qoldi.
Biz hammamiz uning qaroridan hayron qoldik.

words.definition: Feeling fear or worry.
words.definitionUz: Qo'rqmoq — qo'rquv yoki tashvish his qilish.
words.example1: She is afraid of spiders.
words.example2: Don't be afraid to ask questions.
words.example3: He was afraid to speak in public.
extraExamples: Don't be afraid of making mistakes.
He is afraid of failing the exam.
The child was afraid of the dark.
I'm afraid I can't help you.
Many people are afraid of change.

words.definition: To like one thing more than another.
words.definitionUz: Afzal ko'rmoq — bir narsani ikkinchisidan ko'ra ko'proq yoqtirish.
words.example1: I prefer tea to coffee.
words.example1Translation: Men qahvadan ko'ra choyni afzal ko'raman.
extraExamples: She prefers reading books to watching TV.
What kind of music do you prefer?
I prefer to travel by train.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'p odamlar onlayn xarid qilishni afzal ko'rishadi.
U televizor ko'rishdan ko'ra kitob o'qishni afzal ko'radi.
Men qishdan ko'ra yozni afzal ko'raman.
Men poyezdda sayohat qilishni afzal ko'raman.

words.definition: To have the same opinion as someone.
words.definitionUz: Rozi bo'lmoq — boshqa birov bilan bir xil fikrda bo'lish.
words.example1: I agree with you.
words.example3: Do you agree with this decision?
extraExamples: She doesn't agree with her parents.
We all agree that it was a good movie.
They couldn't agree on the price.
Most experts agree on this point.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz hammamiz film yaxshi bo'lganiga qo'shilamiz.
U bizga yordam berishga rozi bo'ldi.

words.definition: To have a different opinion.
words.definitionUz: Rozi bo'lmaslik — boshqa birovdan farqli fikrda bo'lish.
words.example1: I disagree with that idea.
words.example1Translation: Men bu fikr bilan rozi emasman.
extraExamples: They disagreed on the best solution.
It's normal for friends to disagree.
extraExampleTranslations: Men sizning xulosangiz bilan rozi emasman.
Ular eng yaxshi yechim haqida kelisha olmadilar.
Do'stlar o'rtasida fikr farqi bo'lishi tabiiy.

words.definition: A personal belief or view.
words.definitionUz: Fikr — shaxsiy e'tiqod yoki qarash.
words.example1: What is your opinion?
words.example2: In my opinion, it's a good plan.
extraExamples: He changed his opinion after listening.
The teacher asked for students' opinions.

words.definition: To think that something is true.
words.definitionUz: Ishonmoq — biror narsa haqiqat deb hisoblash.
words.example1: I believe you.
extraExamples: Many people believe in climate change.
I believe it will rain tomorrow.
extraExampleTranslations: U uning har bir so'ziga ishonadi.

words.definition: Certain or confident about something.
words.definitionUz: Ishonchli — biror narsaga ishonch hosil qilgan.
words.example1: Are you sure?
words.example3: Make sure you lock the door.
extraExamples: I'm not sure about the answer.
She is sure of her decision.
Are you sure this is the right way?
He made sure everything was ready.
She wasn't sure what to do.
Be sure to call me when you arrive.
extraExampleTranslations: U o'z qaroriga ishonch hosil qilgan.
Bu to'g'ri yo'l ekanligiga ishonchingiz komilmi?
U hammasi tayyor ekanligiga ishonch hosil qildi.
U nima qilishni bilmay turgan edi.
Yetib borgach menga qo'ng'iroq qilganingizga ishonch hosil qiling.

words.definition: Likely to happen or be true.
words.definitionUz: Ehtimol — sodir bo'lishi yoki haqiqat bo'lishi mumkin.
words.example1: It will probably rain tomorrow.
words.example2: She is probably at home now.
words.example3: He will probably win the competition.
extraExamples: She probably forgot about the meeting.

words.definition: To not like something or someone.
words.definitionUz: Yoqtirmaslik — biror narsa yoki odamni yoqtirmaslik.
words.example1: I dislike waking up early.
words.example3: He has a strong dislike for liars.
extraExamples: Dislike of vegetables is common in children.
I don't dislike it, but I don't love it either.
extraExampleTranslations: Men uni yoqtirmayman deb aytolmayman, lekin sevaman ham demayman.

words.definition: Feeling ashamed or shy because of something.
words.definitionUz: Uyalgan — biror narsadan uyat yoki qo'rquv his qilish.
words.example1: He felt embarrassed after making a mistake.
words.example1Translation: U xato qilgandan keyin uyalib qoldi.
words.example2: She was embarrassed by the question.
words.example3: The child was embarrassed in front of the class.
extraExamples: I was embarrassed when I forgot her name.
She felt embarrassed about her old clothes.
They were embarrassed by the situation.
Don't be embarrassed to ask for help.
She turned red when she felt embarrassed.

words.definition: Sad because something was not as good as expected.
words.definitionUz: Hafsalasi pir bo'lgan — kutilganidek bo'lmagani uchun xafa bo'lish.
words.example1: She was disappointed with the result.
words.example2: He felt disappointed after losing the game.
words.example2Translation: U o'yinda mag'lub bo'lgach hafsalasi pir bo'ldi.
words.example3: Don't be disappointed if it doesn't work.
extraExamples: My parents were disappointed in my grades.
I was disappointed by the service.
He tried not to show he was disappointed.
The team was disappointed with their performance.
extraExampleTranslations: Ota-onam mening baholarimdan hafsalasi pir bo'ldi.
U hafsalasi pir bo'lganini ko'rsatmaslikka harakat qildi.
Jamoa o'z natijalaridan hafsalasi pir bo'ldi.
Hafsalasi pir bo'lgan mijozlar salbiy sharhlar yozishdi.

words.definition: Feeling sure about your abilities.
words.definitionUz: O'ziga ishongan — o'z qobiliyatlariga ishonch hosil qilgan.
words.example1: She is confident about the exam.
words.example2: He spoke in a confident voice.
words.example2Translation: U o'ziga ishongan ovoz bilan gapirdi.
extraExamples: The team is confident they will win.
She became more confident after the course.
He is confident in his decision.
I'm not very confident in speaking English.
The teacher encouraged her to be confident.
He walked with a confident step.
extraExampleTranslations: Jamoa g'alaba qozonishiga ishonch hosil qilgan.
U kursdan keyin o'ziga ko'proq ishonadigan bo'ldi.
U o'z qaroriga ishonch hosil qilgan.
Ingliz tilida gapirishga unchalik ishonchim yo'q.
U o'ziga ishongan qadamlar bilan yurardi.

words.definition: Feeling calm and not worried.
words.definitionUz: Tinchlangan — xotirjam va tashvishsiz holat.
words.example1: She felt relaxed after the vacation.
words.example2: The music made the atmosphere relaxed.
extraExamples: The hotel has a relaxed atmosphere.
She was relaxed during the interview.
A warm bath makes you feel relaxed.
He is more relaxed now than before.
The teacher created a relaxed learning environment.
Everyone felt relaxed at the party.

words.definition: Happy because your needs or expectations are met.
words.definitionUz: Qoniqqan — ehtiyojlaringiz yoki kutganingiz bajarilganidan xursand bo'lish.
words.example1: I am satisfied with the result.
words.example2: The customers were satisfied with the service.
words.example3: She felt satisfied after finishing the project.
words.example3Translation: U loyihani tugatgandan keyin qoniqish his qildi.
extraExamples: Are you satisfied with your job?
The teacher was satisfied with the students' work.
She is satisfied with her life.
The company tries to keep customers satisfied.
I felt satisfied after a good meal.

words.definition: A temporary state of mind or feeling.
words.definitionUz: Kayfiyat — vaqtinchalik ruhiy holat yoki his-tuyg'u.
words.example1: She is in a good mood today.
words.example3: Don't talk to him when he is in a bad mood.
words.example3Translation: U yomon kayfiyatda bo'lganda u bilan gaplashmang.
extraExamples: He woke up in a bad mood.
The party put everyone in a good mood.
Her mood improved after the call.
I'm not in the mood to go out.
The film created a romantic mood.

words.definition: To copy data from the internet to your device.
words.definitionUz: Yuklab olish — internetdan qurilmangizga ma'lumot ko'chirib olish.
words.example1: I need to download the file.
words.example3: Downloading takes time with slow internet.
words.example3Translation: Sekin internetda yuklab olish vaqt oladi.
extraExamples: You can download the book for free.
Make sure the download is safe.
She downloaded music for the trip.
You need to download the update.
extraExampleTranslations: U eng yangi versiyani yuklab oldi.
Yuklab olish xavfsiz ekanligiga ishonch hosil qiling.
U sayohat uchun musiqa yuklab oldi.

words.definition: To copy data from your device to the internet.
words.definitionUz: Yuklash — qurilmangizdan internetga ma'lumot joylashtirish.
words.example1: Please upload the photo.
words.example2: He uploaded the video to YouTube.
extraExamples: Uploading photos is easy on this app.
Make sure to upload the correct version.
extraExampleTranslations: To'g'ri versiyani yuklaganingizga ishonch hosil qiling.

words.definition: A set of web pages on the internet.
words.definitionUz: Veb-sayt — internetdagi bir nechta veb-sahifalar to'plami.
words.example1: The company has a new website.
words.example2: I found the information on their website.
extraExamples: Visit our website for more details.
The website is easy to use.
You can buy tickets on the website.
Her blog is a popular website.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'p veb-saytlar bepul xizmatlarni taklif qiladi.

words.definition: A software application for mobile devices.
words.definitionUz: Ilova — mobil qurilmalar uchun dastur.
words.example1: I downloaded a new language learning app.
words.example1Translation: Men yangi til o'rganish ilovasini yuklab oldim.
words.example3: She uses a fitness app every day.
words.example3Translation: U har kuni sport ilovasidan foydalanadi.
extraExamples: The app is free to download.
There is an app for everything now.
The app crashed while I was using it.
Social media apps are very popular.
This app helps me manage my time.
extraExampleTranslations: Hozir hamma narsa uchun ilova bor.
Bu ilova vaqtimni boshqarishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: A conversation using a phone.
words.definitionUz: Telefon qo'ng'irog'i — telefon orqali suhbatlashish.
words.example1: I received an important phone call.
words.example2: She made a phone call to her friend.
words.example3: Phone calls are becoming less common.
extraExamples: I'll give you a phone call later.
He is on a phone call right now.
Important decisions are made during phone calls.
The phone call was from an unknown number.
Video phone calls are more personal.
extraExampleTranslations: Muhim qarorlar telefon qo'ng'irog'i vaqtida qabul qilinadi.

words.definition: A device used to charge a battery.
words.definitionUz: Zaryadlovchi — batareyani zaryad qilish uchun qurilma.
words.example1: I forgot my phone charger.
extraExamples: She bought a new wireless charger.
The charger is in my bag.
Always carry your charger with you.
The charger came with the phone.
extraExampleTranslations: Har doim zaryadlovchingizni o'zingiz bilan olib yuring.

words.definition: Websites and apps used for social interaction.
words.definitionUz: Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar — ijtimoiy muloqot uchun veb-saytlar va ilovalar.
words.example1: She spends a lot of time on social media.
words.example1Translation: U ijtimoiy tarmoqlarda ko'p vaqt o'tkazadi.
words.example2: Social media connects people around the world.
words.example2Translation: Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar butun dunyo odamlarini bog'laydi.
words.example3: Many companies use social media for marketing.
words.example3Translation: Ko'p kompaniyalar marketing uchun ijtimoiy tarmoqlardan foydalanadi.
extraExamples: He follows news on social media.
She posted the photo on social media.
Parents worry about children using social media.
I reduced my time on social media.
extraExampleTranslations: Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar qaramlikka olib kelishi mumkin.
Ota-onalar bolalarning ijtimoiy tarmoqlardan foydalanishidan xavotirda.
Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar kichik bizneslarga yordam beradi.
Men ijtimoiy tarmoqlarda o'tkazadigan vaqtni qisqartirdim.

words.definition: Information about recent events.
words.definitionUz: Yangiliklar — yaqinda sodir bo'lgan voqealar haqidagi ma'lumot.
words.example1: I watch the news every evening.
words.example1Translation: Men har kuni kechqurun yangiliklarni ko'raman.
words.example3: She reads news on her phone.
extraExamples: He listens to the radio news.
The news about the election was important.
Fake news is a big problem.

words.definition: A motion picture or movie.
words.definitionUz: Film — harakatdagi tasvirlar to'plami.
words.example1: We watched a great film last night.
words.example2: She wants to make a film.
extraExamples: The film was based on a true story.
Many films are made in Hollywood.
Let's go to the cinema to watch a film.

words.definition: A motion picture (American English for film).
words.definitionUz: Film — harakatdagi tasvirlar (Amerika inglizchasida).
words.example1: Let's watch a movie tonight.
extraExamples: We went to the movie theater.
This movie is based on a book.

words.definition: A piece of music with words.
words.definitionUz: Qo'shiq — so'zli musiqa asari.
words.example1: This is my favorite song.
extraExamples: He wrote a song for her.
I listen to songs while studying.
The song has a nice melody.
She knows all the words to the song.
They played our favorite song at the party.

words.definition: A TV or radio show, or a planned series of activities.
words.definitionUz: Dastur — televideniye yoki radio ko'rsatuvi yoki rejalashtirilgan tadbirlar ketma-ketligi.
words.example1: My favorite programme is on at 9 PM.
words.example1Translation: Mening sevimli dasturim soat 21:00 da boshlanadi.
words.example2: The school has a sports programme.
extraExamples: He is in charge of the programme.
The government started a new education programme.

words.definition: A message or photo shared on social media.
words.definitionUz: Post — ijtimoiy tarmoqlarda baham ko'riladigan xabar yoki fotosurat.
words.example1: She posted a beautiful photo.
words.example2: I saw your post on Instagram.
extraExamples: I need to post an update.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning posti juda mashhur bo'lib ketdi.

words.definition: Connected to the internet.
words.definitionUz: Onlayn — internetga ulangan holat.
words.example1: I shop online.

words.definition: A piece of equipment made for a particular purpose.
words.definitionUz: Qurilma — ma'lum bir maqsad uchun ishlab chiqarilgan asbob.
words.example1: This device is very useful.
words.example2: She bought a new electronic device.
words.example2Translation: U yangi elektron qurilma sotib oldi.
extraExamples: The device is easy to use.
All devices need to be charged.

words.definition: A small useful device.
words.definitionUz: Gadjet — kichik va foydali qurilma.
words.example1: He loves buying new gadgets.
words.example1Translation: U yangi gadjetlar sotib olishni yaxshi ko'radi.
words.example2: This gadget helps me wake up early.
words.example2Translation: Bu gadjet menga erta uyg'onishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: She received a smart gadget as a gift.
The gadget is small but powerful.
extraExampleTranslations: U sovg'a sifatida aqlli gadjet oldi.

words.definition: The flat surface of a device that shows images.
words.definitionUz: Ekran — qurilmaning tasvirlarni ko'rsatadigan tekis yuzasi.
words.example1: The screen is very bright.
extraExamples: There is a crack on the screen.
He stared at the screen for hours.
The screen size is important for gaming.
She dropped her phone and broke the screen.
The movie looks great on this screen.

words.definition: A device that stores energy to power other devices.
words.definitionUz: Batareya — boshqa qurilmalarni quvvatlantirish uchun energiya saqlaydigan qurilma.
words.example1: My phone battery is low.
words.example3: I need to charge the battery.
extraExamples: This laptop has a good battery life.

words.definition: A recording of moving images and sound.
words.definitionUz: Video — harakatdagi tasvirlar va ovozdan iborat yozuv.
words.example1: They watched a funny video together.
words.example2: She uploaded her travel video on social media.
words.example2Translation: U sayohat videosini ijtimoiy tarmoqqa joyladi.
words.example3: The video tutorial helped him learn cooking.
words.example3Translation: Video qo‘llanma unga ovqat pishirishni o‘rganishga yordam berdi.
extraExamples: He recorded a short video of the event.
Watching videos is a popular way to relax.
She edited the video before posting it.
Educational videos are very useful for students.
They made a family video for the celebration.
extraExampleTranslations: U tadbirning qisqa videosini yozib oldi.
Videolarni tomosha qilish dam olishning mashhur usuli.
U videoni joylashdan oldin tahrirlab chiqdi.
Ta’limiy videolar talabalar uchun juda foydali.
Ular bayram uchun oilaviy video tayyorlashdi.

words.definition: A device used to take photographs or record videos.
words.definitionUz: Kamera — fotosurat olish yoki video yozish uchun ishlatiladigan qurilma.
words.example1: She took many photos with her new camera.
words.example1Translation: U yangi kamerasi bilan ko‘p suratga tushdi.
words.example3: He forgot to bring his camera on the trip.
words.example3Translation: U sayohatga kamerasini olib borishni unutgan.
extraExamples: Smartphone cameras are very advanced now.
She loves taking pictures with her camera.
The video camera recorded the whole concert.
Hidden cameras are sometimes used for surveillance.
The camera captured a beautiful sunset.
extraExampleTranslations: U kamerasi bilan suratga tushishni yaxshi ko‘radi.
Video kamera butun kontsertni yozib oldi.
Yashirin kameralar ba’zan kuzatuv uchun ishlatiladi.
Kamera chiroyli quyosh botishini suratga oldi.

words.definition: The natural world around us, including air, water, and land.
words.definitionUz: Atrof-muhit — bizni o‘rab turgan tabiiy dunyo, havo, suv va yerni o‘z ichiga oladi.
words.example1: We must protect the environment.
extraExamples: A clean environment is important for health.
The company cares about the environment.
Living in a good environment improves life quality.
We need to save the environment for future generations.
extraExampleTranslations: Yaxshi atrof-muhitda yashash hayot sifatini oshiradi.
Kelajak avlodlar uchun atrof-muhitni saqlab qolishimiz kerak.

words.definition: The presence of harmful substances in the environment.
words.definitionUz: Ifloslanish — atrof-muhitda zararli moddalarning mavjudligi.
words.example1: Air pollution is a big problem in big cities.
words.example1Translation: Havo ifloslanishi katta shaharlarda katta muammo.
words.example3: Factories cause a lot of pollution.
extraExamples: The government is fighting against pollution.
She is concerned about environmental pollution.
Light pollution makes it hard to see stars.
extraExampleTranslations: Shovqin ifloslanishi odamlar salomatligiga ta’sir qiladi.
Plastik ifloslanish dengiz hayotiga zarar yetkazadi.

words.definition: To process used materials so they can be used again.
words.definitionUz: Qayta ishlash — ishlatilgan materiallarni qayta ishlatish uchun qayta ishlash.
words.example1: We recycle paper and plastic.
words.example1Translation: Biz qog‘oz va plastikni qayta ishlashimiz kerak.
words.example2Translation: Qayta ishlash atrof-muhitni himoya qilishga yordam beradi.
words.example3: She always recycles bottles and cans.
words.example3Translation: U har doim shisha va konservalarni qayta ishlaydi.
extraExamples: The city encourages people to recycle.
He sorted the rubbish for recycling.
They built a new recycling center.
extraExampleTranslations: U chiqindilarni qayta ishlash uchun ajratdi.
Ko‘p kompaniyalar qayta ishlangan materiallardan foydalanadi.
Ular yangi qayta ishlash markazini qurishdi.

words.definition: Waste material that is thrown away.
words.definitionUz: Chiqindi — tashlanadigan keraksiz materiallar.
words.example1: Don’t throw rubbish on the street.
words.example2: They collected all the rubbish after the picnic.
words.example2Translation: Ular piknikdan keyin barcha chiqindini yig‘ib oldi.
words.example3Translation: Qayta ishlash chiqindini kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: The bin is full of rubbish.
He sorted the rubbish for recycling.
Too much rubbish harms the environment.
She threw the old clothes in the rubbish.
Plastic rubbish takes hundreds of years to decompose.
Keep public places free from rubbish.
extraExampleTranslations: U chiqindini qayta ishlash uchun ajratdi.
Juda ko‘p chiqindi atrof-muhitga zarar yetkazadi.

words.definition: A container for putting rubbish.
words.definitionUz: Chiqindi qutisi — chiqindilarni tashlash uchun idish.
words.example1: Please put the wrapper in the bin.
words.example3: Separate bins for recycling are available.
words.example3Translation: Qayta ishlash uchun alohida chiqindi qutilari mavjud.
extraExamples: He threw the bottle into the recycling bin.
Don’t forget to take out the bin.
Public bins help keep streets clean.
She bought a new bin for the office.
Sort your waste into different bins.
extraExampleTranslations: U shishani qayta ishlash qutisiga tashladi.
Chiqindi qutisini tashqariga olib chiqishni unutmang.
Jamoat chiqindi qutilari ko‘chalarni toza saqlashga yordam beradi.
U ofis uchun yangi chiqindi qutisini sotib oldi.

words.definition: A synthetic material used to make many everyday objects.
words.definitionUz: Plastik — ko‘plab kundalik buyumlar tayyorlash uchun ishlatiladigan sun’iy material.
words.example1: We should reduce plastic waste.
words.example2: The bag is made of plastic.
words.example3: Single-use plastic is harmful to the environment.
extraExamples: The toy is made from safe plastic.
Many things in our home are made of plastic.
Banning plastic bags helped the environment.
extraExampleTranslations: U plastik mahsulotlar sotib olishdan qochadi.
Plastik sumkalarni taqiqlash atrof-muhitga yordam berdi.

words.definition: To keep someone or something safe from harm.
words.definitionUz: Himoya qilmoq — kimnidir yoki nimanidir zararlanishdan saqlamoq.
words.example1: We must protect the environment.
words.example2: Sunscreen protects your skin from the sun.
words.example2Translation: Quyoshdan himoya kremlari terini quyoshdan saqlaydi.
extraExamples: She wears gloves to protect her hands.
Trees protect the soil from erosion.
He tried to protect his friend.
extraExampleTranslations: U qo‘llarini himoya qilish uchun qo‘lqop kiyadi.
Quyosh ko‘zoynagi bilan ko‘zlaringizni himoya qiling.
U do‘stini himoya qilishga harakat qildi.

words.definition: The usual weather conditions in a particular area.
words.definitionUz: Iqlim — ma’lum bir hududda odatdagi ob-havo holati.
words.example1: The climate in this region is warm.
words.example2: Climate change is affecting the whole world.
words.example2Translation: Iqlim o‘zgarishi butun dunyoga ta’sir qilmoqda.
words.example3: She loves countries with a tropical climate.
words.example3Translation: U tropik iqlimli mamlakatlarni yaxshi ko‘radi.
extraExamples: The climate is getting hotter every year.
We need to fight climate change.
extraExampleTranslations: Iqlim har yili issiqroq bo‘lib bormoqda.
Biz iqlim o‘zgarishiga qarshi kurashishimiz kerak.

words.definition: A prediction of what the weather will be like.
words.definitionUz: Ob-havo prognozi — ob-havo qanday bo‘lishi haqidagi bashorat.
words.example1: The weather forecast says it will rain tomorrow.
words.example1Translation: Ob-havo prognozi ertaga yomg‘ir yog‘ishini aytmoqda.
words.example2: Check the weather forecast before going out.
words.example2Translation: Tashqariga chiqishdan oldin ob-havo prognozini tekshiring.
words.example3: The weather forecast was wrong again.
extraExamples: She watches the weather forecast every morning.
The app gives accurate weather forecasts.
According to the forecast, it will be cold.
Long-term weather forecasts are less reliable.
The weather forecast warned of a storm.
extraExampleTranslations: U har kuni ertalab ob-havo prognozini ko‘radi.
Uzoq muddatli ob-havo prognozlari kamroq ishonchli.

words.definition: The power that makes things work or move.
words.definitionUz: Energiya — narsalarni ishlatadigan yoki harakatga keltiradigan kuch.
words.example1: We need to save energy.
words.example3: She has a lot of energy in the morning.
words.example3Translation: U ertalab juda ko‘p energiyaga ega.
extraExamples: The body needs energy from food.
Nuclear energy has advantages and risks.
Save energy by turning off lights.
The company invests in clean energy.
extraExampleTranslations: Yadro energiyasining afzalliklari va xavflari bor.

words.definition: To use water carefully so it is not wasted.
words.definitionUz: Suvni tejash — suvni ehtiyotkorlik bilan ishlatib, uni isrof qilmaslik.
words.example1: We should save water by taking shorter showers.
words.example1Translation: Qisqaroq dush qabul qilib suvni tejashimiz kerak.
words.example2: Turning off the tap while brushing teeth helps save water.
words.example2Translation: Tish yuvayotganda jo‘mrakni yopish suvni tejashga yordam beradi.
words.example3: Saving water is important for the environment.
extraExamples: Farmers use technology to save water.
The campaign encourages everyone to save water.
She always saves water in daily life.
Children learned how to save water at school.
We must save water during dry seasons.
extraExampleTranslations: Fermerlar suvni tejash uchun texnologiyadan foydalanadi.
Aksiya har kimni suvni tejashga undaydi.
U kundalik hayotda doim suvni tejaydi.
Bolalar maktabda suvni qanday tejashni o‘rganishdi.

words.definition: Land outside cities and towns, with fields, villages, and nature.
words.definitionUz: Qishloq joylari — shahar va shaharchalardan tashqaridagi dalalar, qishloqlar va tabiat bilan to‘la yerlar.
words.example1: They spent the weekend in the countryside.
words.example1Translation: Ular dam olish kunlarini qishloqda o‘tkazishdi.
words.example2: The countryside is quiet and peaceful.
words.example3: Many people prefer living in the countryside.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘p odamlar qishloq joylarida yashashni afzallik berishadi.
extraExamples: Fresh air in the countryside is healthy.
He grew up in the countryside.
Tourism in the countryside is growing.
Life in the countryside is slower.
She enjoys walking in the countryside.

words.definition: To remove dirt or rubbish from a place.
words.definitionUz: Tozalamoq — biror joydan axlat yoki ifloslikni olib tashlash.
words.example1: We cleaned up the park after the picnic.
words.example2: She cleaned up her room quickly.
words.example3: Volunteers clean up the beach every month.
extraExamples: The students cleaned up the classroom.
It took hours to clean up the mess.
Clean up the kitchen after cooking.
The city cleaned up the river.

words.definition: A large area covered with trees.
words.definitionUz: O‘rmon — daraxtlar bilan qoplangan katta maydon.
words.example1: They went hiking in the forest.
words.example2: Forests are important for the environment.
words.example3: Many animals live in the forest.
extraExamples: The Amazon forest is the largest in the world.
We must protect forests from deforestation.
The forest was dark and mysterious.
They planted trees in the forest.
She loves walking through the forest.
extraExampleTranslations: O‘rmonlarni o‘rmonlarni kesishdan himoya qilishimiz kerak.
O‘rmonlar kislorod ishlab chiqarishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: A very high hill with steep sides.
words.definitionUz: Tog‘ — tik yonbag‘irga ega juda baland tepalik.
words.example1: They climbed the mountain last summer.
words.example2: The mountain was covered with snow.
words.example3: Mountain air is fresh and clean.
extraExamples: Mount Everest is the highest mountain.
Many animals live in the mountains.
The road through the mountains is beautiful.
They went skiing in the mountains.

words.definition: A large stream of water flowing across the land.
words.definitionUz: Daryo — yer bo‘ylab oqib o‘tadigan katta suv oqimi.
words.example1: They went fishing by the river.
words.example2: The river flows into the sea.
extraExamples: The Nile is a very long river.
They had a picnic near the river.
Protecting rivers is important for the environment.
extraExampleTranslations: Daryolarni himoya qilish atrof-muhit uchun muhim.

words.definition: A large area of water surrounded by land.
words.definitionUz: Ko‘l — yer bilan o‘ralgan katta suv maydoni.
words.example1: They swam in the lake during summer.
words.example2: The lake is beautiful at sunset.
words.example3: There are many fish in this lake.
extraExamples: Lake Baikal is the deepest lake.
They had a boat ride on the lake.
Many birds live around the lake.
The lake water is very clear.
They built a house near the lake.
Protecting lakes is important for wildlife.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘llarni himoya qilish yovvoyi hayot uchun muhim.

words.definition: A large body of salt water.
words.definitionUz: Dengiz — katta sho‘r suv havzasi.
words.example1: They went to the sea for vacation.
words.example1Translation: Ular dam olish uchun dengizga borishdi.
words.example3: Many fish live in the sea.
extraExamples: She loves listening to the sound of the sea.
The sea provides food for many people.
extraExampleTranslations: U dengiz ovozini tinglashni yaxshi ko‘radi.
Dengiz ko‘p odamlar uchun ovqat manbai.

words.definition: A very large area of sea.
words.definitionUz: Okean — juda katta dengiz maydoni.
words.example1: The Pacific Ocean is the largest.
words.example2: Oceans cover most of the Earth.
words.example3: They explored the ocean on a submarine.
words.example3Translation: Ular suv osti kemasida okeanni o‘rganishdi.
extraExamples: The ocean is home to many creatures.
She dreams of swimming in the ocean.
Oceans are important for global trade.

words.definition: A list of food and drinks available in a restaurant.
words.definitionUz: Menyu — restoranda mavjud ovqat va ichimliklar ro‘yxati.
words.example1: The waiter brought the menu.
words.example2: She looked at the menu to choose her meal.
words.example2Translation: U ovqatni tanlash uchun menyuni ko‘rib chiqdi.
words.example3: This restaurant has a vegetarian menu.
extraExamples: He couldn’t decide from the menu.
The kids menu has simple dishes.
The special menu is very popular.
She asked for the wine menu.
The menu includes pictures of the dishes.

words.definition: To ask for food or goods in a restaurant or shop.
words.definitionUz: Buyurtma bermoq — restoranda yoki do‘konda ovqat yoki tovar so‘ramoq.
words.example1: We ordered pizza for dinner.
words.example1Translation: Biz kechki ovqatga pitsa buyurtma qildik.
words.example2: She ordered a coffee and a sandwich.
words.example2Translation: U kofe va sendvich buyurtma qildi.
extraExamples: He ordered online from the restaurant.
The food arrived after we ordered.
She ordered a table for six people.
I need to order more supplies.
They ordered dessert after the main course.
extraExampleTranslations: U olti kishilik stol buyurtma qildi.
Menga ko‘proq material buyurtma qilish kerak.
Ular asosiy taomdan keyin desert buyurtma qilishdi.

words.definition: A woman who serves customers in a restaurant.
words.definitionUz: Ofitsiantka — restoranda mijozlarga xizmat ko‘rsatadigan ayol.
words.example1: The waitress brought the menu.
words.example2: She works as a waitress in a cafe.
extraExamples: The waitress recommended the special dish.
He asked the waitress for the bill.
The waitress smiled at the customers.

words.definition: Having a strong hot taste.
words.definitionUz: Achchiq — kuchli issiq ta’mga ega.
words.example1: The food is very spicy.
words.example2Translation: U achchiq hind taomlarini yaxshi ko‘radi.
words.example3: This curry is too spicy for me.
words.example3Translation: Bu kari men uchun juda achchiq.
extraExamples: He added spicy sauce to his meal.
Spicy food can make you sweat.
She can’t eat very spicy dishes.
The restaurant is famous for spicy noodles.
Spicy flavors are popular in Asia.
extraExampleTranslations: U juda achchiq taomlarni yeya olmaydi.

words.definition: Turned into ice or very cold.
words.definitionUz: Muzlatilgan — muz holatiga keltirilgan yoki juda sovuq.
words.example1: She bought frozen vegetables.
words.example2: The lake is frozen in winter.
words.example3: The frozen food section is over there.
extraExamples: Frozen pizza is easy to prepare.
His hands were frozen from the cold.
She prefers fresh over frozen food.

words.example2: Fresh ingredients make the food tastier.

words.definition: A prepared food item.

words.definition: A sweet food eaten after the main course.
words.definitionUz: Desert — asosiy taomdan keyin yeyiladigan shirin ovqat.

words.definition: The most important dish in a meal.
words.definitionUz: Asosiy taom — ovqatning eng muhim qismi.

words.definition: An arrangement to keep a table, room, etc. for someone.
words.definitionUz: Bron qilish — stol, xona va h.k. ni oldindan band qilish.

words.definition: Food prepared in a restaurant to be eaten somewhere else.
words.definitionUz: Olib ketish — restoranda tayyorlanib, boshqa joyda yeyiladigan ovqat.

words.example1Translation: Biz kechki ovqatga olib ketish buyurtma qildik.
words.example2Translation: Olib ketish ovqati hali ham issiq edi.
words.example3: Many people prefer takeaway on busy days.

words.definition: The food and drink that a person usually consumes.
words.definitionUz: Parhez — odam odatda iste’mol qiladigan ovqat va ichimliklar.

words.example3: He changed his diet to lose weight.

words.definition: A person who does not eat meat.
words.definitionUz: Vegetarian — go‘sht yemaydigan odam.
words.example1: She is a vegetarian.
words.example3: Many people choose a vegetarian diet.
extraExamples: He became vegetarian for health reasons.

words.definition: Food that is good for your health.
words.definitionUz: Sog‘lom ovqat — salomatlik uchun foydali ovqat.

words.example2: Fruits and vegetables are healthy food.

extraExampleTranslations: Sog‘lom ovqat ham mazali bo‘lishi mumkin.

words.definition: Food that is prepared and served quickly.
words.definitionUz: Tez tayyorlanadigan ovqat — tez tayyorlanib, tez beriladigan ovqat.

words.example2: They ordered fast food for lunch.

words.definition: A meal cooked outdoors on a grill.
words.definitionUz: Barbekyu — ochiq havoda grilda pishiriladigan ovqat.

words.definition: Having a very pleasant taste.
words.definitionUz: Mazali — juda yoqimli ta’mga ega.

words.definition: Recently produced or picked, not old or preserved.
words.definitionUz: Yangi — yaqinda yetishtirilgan yoki terilgan, eski yoki saqlangan emas.

words.definition: A small amount of food eaten between meals.
words.definitionUz: Gazak - ovqatlar orasida yeyiladigan kichik miqdordagi ovqat.

words.definitionUz: Retsept - muayyan taomni pishirish uchun ko‘rsatmalar to‘plami.

words.definition: An occasion when food is eaten, or the food eaten at that time.
words.definitionUz: Meal - ovqat yeyiladigan vaqt yoki shu vaqtda yeyiladigan ovqat.

words.example1Translation: Biz odatda kuniga uch marta ovqatlanamiz.

There is a laundry room in the building.
Put the dirty laundry in the basket.
extraExampleTranslations: U kirini kir yuvishxonasiga olib boradi.

words.definition: A person who lives near you.
words.definitionUz: Neighbour - sizga yaqin yashaydigan odam.
words.example1: Our neighbours are very friendly.
words.example2: She borrowed some sugar from her neighbour.
words.example2Translation: U qo‘shnisidan bir oz shakar oldi.
words.example3: The neighbours helped us move the furniture.
extraExamples: We have good relations with our neighbours.
He invited the neighbours to the party.
The new neighbours moved in yesterday.

words.definition: An area where people live on the edge of a city.
words.definitionUz: Suburb - shahar chekkasida odamlar yashaydigan hudud.
words.example1: They live in a quiet suburb.
words.example3: It takes 30 minutes to drive from the suburb to the city center.
words.example3Translation: Shahar atrofidan markazga mashinada 30 daqiqa ketadi.
extraExamples: She grew up in the suburbs.
Life in the suburbs is peaceful.
Many families prefer living in suburbs.
He commutes from the suburb every day.
New houses are being built in the suburbs.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p oilalar shahar atrofida yashashni afzal ko‘radilar.
U har kuni shahar atrofidan ishga qatnaydi.

words.definition: A set of rooms for living in, usually on one floor of a building.
words.definitionUz: Apartment - odatda binoning bir qavatida joylashgan yashash uchun xonalar to‘plami.
