words.example1: She lives in a small apartment in the city.
words.example2Translation: Ular ikki xonali kvartirani ijaraga olishdi.
words.example3: The apartment has a nice view.
extraExamples: He is looking for a new apartment.
Apartment prices are high in this area.

words.definition: A machine or device used in the home, such as a refrigerator or washing machine.
words.definitionUz: Appliance - uyda ishlatiladigan mashina yoki qurilma, masalan, muzlatkich yoki kir yuvish mashinasi.
words.example1: The new apartment has modern appliances.
words.example1Translation: Yangi kvartirada zamonaviy maishiy texnikalar bor.
words.example2: We need to buy a new washing appliance.
words.example2Translation: Biz yangi kir yuvish mashinasi sotib olishimiz kerak.
extraExamples: The store sells many different appliances.

words.definition: To clean plates, bowls, and other items used for eating.
words.definitionUz: Wash dishes - ovqat yeyish uchun ishlatilgan tovoq, piyola va boshqa idishlarni yuvish.
words.example1: He helps his wife wash dishes after dinner.
words.example1Translation: U kechki ovqatdan keyin xotiniga idish yuvishda yordam beradi.
words.example2: Can you wash the dishes please?
extraExamples: Use hot water to wash dishes.
The children take turns washing dishes.
There is a dishwasher to wash dishes.
She broke a plate while washing dishes.
Washing dishes is a daily chore.

words.definition: An area of land where flowers, vegetables, or fruits are grown.
words.definitionUz: Garden - gullar, sabzavotlar yoki mevalar o‘stiriladigan yer maydoni.
words.example1: She grows vegetables in her garden.
words.example2: The garden is full of beautiful flowers.
words.example3: They are having a party in the garden.
extraExamples: He spends weekends working in the garden.
There is a small garden behind the house.
She planted roses in the garden.
The garden looks beautiful in spring.
We have fruit trees in our garden.
extraExampleTranslations: U dam olish kunlarini bog‘da ishlab o‘tkazadi.

words.definition: A structure with walls and a roof, such as a house or office.
words.definitionUz: Building - devor va tomli inshoot, masalan, uy yoki ofis.
words.example1: The building has ten floors.
words.example2: They are constructing a new building.
words.example3: The office building is in the city center.
extraExamples: She works in that tall building.
There are many buildings in the area.
The building has a parking lot.
They live in an apartment building.

words.definition: A particular part of a place or city.
words.definitionUz: Area - joyning muayyan qismi yoki shahar hududi.
words.example1: This is a safe residential area.
words.example2: There are many shops in this area.
words.example3: She lives in a rural area.
extraExamples: The park is in a central area.
This area is known for its restaurants.
The area has good public transport.
It is a beautiful scenic area.
The company is expanding to new areas.

words.definition: A large area of land that has particular features.
words.definitionUz: Region - o‘ziga xos xususiyatlarga ega katta yer maydoni.
words.example1: This region is famous for its wine.
words.example2: She comes from a mountainous region.
words.example3: The economy of the region is growing.
extraExamples: The government invested in the region.
People from this region are very hospitable.

words.definition: The middle point or main area of a place.
words.definitionUz: Centre - joyning o‘rtasi yoki asosiy qismi.
words.example1: The hotel is in the city centre.
words.example2: She works at a shopping centre.
words.example3: The library is at the centre of the town.
extraExamples: The conference centre is very modern.
They met in the town centre.
The centre of attention was the singer.
There is a sports centre nearby.
She lives close to the business centre.
The exhibition is at the cultural centre.

words.definition: The details of the place where someone lives or works.
words.definitionUz: Address - kimdir yashaydigan yoki ishlaydigan joyning batafsil ma’lumotlari.
words.example1: Please write down your address.
words.example3: The package was sent to the wrong address.
extraExamples: She changed her address last month.
The address is on the envelope.
The office address is in the email.
They moved to a new address.
The building has no street address.

words.definition: Allowing you to feel relaxed and not in pain.
words.definitionUz: Comfortable - sizni bo‘sh va og‘riqsiz his qilishga imkon beradigan qulay.
words.example1: The sofa is very comfortable.
words.example2: She felt comfortable in her new home.
words.example2Translation: U yangi uyida o‘zini qulay his qildi.
words.example3: Wear comfortable shoes for the trip.
extraExamples: The bed is soft and comfortable.
He is comfortable speaking in public.
She made herself comfortable on the chair.
It is comfortable to live here.
The clothes are comfortable to wear.
extraExampleTranslations: U ommaviy gapirishda o‘zini qulay his qiladi.
U stulda o‘zini qulay his qildi.

words.definition: Likely to cause harm or injury.
words.definitionUz: Dangerous - zarar yetkazishi yoki jarohatga olib kelishi mumkin bo‘lgan xavfli.
words.example1: It is dangerous to drive too fast.
words.example2: The area is dangerous at night.
words.example3: Don't play near the dangerous road.
extraExamples: It is dangerous to swim here.

words.definition: Known by many people.
words.definitionUz: Famous - ko‘p odamlar biladigan mashhur.
words.example1: The city is famous for its historical buildings.
words.example2: She wants to become a famous singer.
words.example3: This restaurant is famous for its pizza.
extraExamples: The mountain is famous around the world.
She became famous after the song.
The town is famous for its festival.
Famous people often live busy lives.
This book made the author famous.
extraExampleTranslations: Mashhur odamlar odatda band hayot kechiradilar.

words.definition: Willing to help or useful.
words.definitionUz: Helpful - yordam berishga tayyor yoki foydali.
words.example1: The staff was very helpful.
words.example2: This guide is helpful for beginners.
words.example2Translation: Bu qo‘llanma yangi boshlovchilar uchun foydali.
words.example3: He gave me some helpful advice.
words.example3Translation: U menga bir necha foydali maslahat berdi.
extraExamples: She is always helpful to her friends.
Thank you for being so helpful.
The teacher is helpful and patient.
This tool is helpful for the job.
extraExampleTranslations: U do‘stlariga har doim yordam beradi.

words.definition: Very unpleasant, bad, or shocking.
words.definitionUz: Horrible - juda yoqimsiz, yomon yoki hayratlanarli darajada dahshatli.
words.example1: The weather was horrible yesterday.
extraExamples: He felt horrible after the argument.
The service at the hotel was horrible.
extraExampleTranslations: Janjaldan keyin u o‘zini yomon his qildi.
U kuchli bosh og‘rig‘idan aziyat chekdi.

words.definition: Extremely large in size or amount.
words.definitionUz: Ulkan — juda katta hajm yoki miqdorda bo‘lgan.
words.example1: They live in a huge house near the lake.
words.example1Translation: Ular ko‘l bo‘yida ulkan uyda yashaydilar.
words.example2: The party was a huge success.
words.example3: There was a huge crowd at the concert.
extraExamples: The elephant is a huge animal.
The company made huge profits last year.
The difference between the two is huge.
extraExampleTranslations: Kompaniya o‘tgan yili ulkan foyda ko‘rdi.

words.definition: Very beautiful, pleasant, or enjoyable.
words.definitionUz: Yoqimli — juda chiroyli, yoqimli yoki zavqli.
words.example1: We had a lovely time on holiday.
extraExamples: The garden looks lovely in spring.
We stayed in a lovely little village.

words.definition: Having good luck.
words.definitionUz: Baxtli — omadli, yaxshi omadga ega.
words.example1: You are lucky to have such good friends.
words.example1Translation: Bunday yaxshi do‘stlarga ega bo‘lganingiz baxtingiz bor.
words.example2: She was lucky to win the prize.
words.example3Translation: U o‘zini juda baxtli his qildi.
extraExamples: We were lucky with the weather.
Buying this house was a lucky choice.
Some people seem to be born lucky.
I was lucky enough to get a seat.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu uyni sotib olish baxtli tanlov edi.

words.definition: Relating to the present time; new and up-to-date.
words.definitionUz: Zamonaviy — hozirgi zamonga tegishli; yangi va dolzarb.
words.example1: She lives in a modern apartment.
words.example2: Modern technology has changed our lives.
words.example3: The city has many modern buildings.
extraExamples: The school uses modern teaching methods.
This is a modern approach to the problem.
Modern medicine has made great progress.
The hotel is very modern and comfortable.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu muammoni hal qilishning zamonaviy yondashuvi.

words.definition: Needed to be done or achieved.
words.definitionUz: Zarur — bajarilishi yoki erishilishi kerak bo‘lgan.
words.example1: It is necessary to study hard for the exam.
words.example3: We made all the necessary preparations.
extraExamples: A passport is necessary for travel.
It wasn’t necessary to buy a new one.
Exercise is necessary for good health.
Money is necessary but not everything.
The meeting is necessary to solve the issue.
extraExampleTranslations: Yangi narsa sotib olish shart emas edi.
Muammoni hal qilish uchun yig‘ilish zarur.

words.definition: Usual, typical, or expected.
words.definitionUz: Oddiy — odatiy, odatdagi yoki kutilgan.
words.example1: It’s normal to feel nervous before an exam.
words.example2: The weather is normal for this time of year.
words.example3: Everything returned to normal after the storm.
words.example3Translation: Bo‘rondan keyin hamma narsa oddiy holatga qaytdi.
extraExamples: The train arrived at the normal time.
It’s perfectly normal to make mistakes.
He seems like a normal person.
We had a normal day at school.

words.definition: Having no mistakes or faults; as good as it is possible to be.
words.definitionUz: Mukammal — hech qanday xato yoki nuqsonsiz; imkon qadar yaxshi.
words.example1: The weather was perfect for a picnic.
extraExamples: He is trying to find the perfect gift.
extraExampleTranslations: U mukammal sovg‘a topishga harakat qilmoqda.

words.definition: Giving a feeling of happiness or enjoyment.
words.definitionUz: Yoqimli — baxt yoki zavq tuyg‘usini beradigan.
words.example1: We spent a pleasant evening together.
extraExamples: The room has a pleasant smell.
He is a pleasant person to talk to.
The garden is very pleasant in summer.
The music created a pleasant atmosphere.

words.definition: Liked or admired by many people.
words.definitionUz: Mashhur — ko‘p odamlar tomonidan yoqiladigan yoki hurmat qilinadigan.
words.example1: Soccer is very popular in many countries.
words.example2: She is one of the most popular singers.
words.example3: This is a popular tourist destination.
extraExamples: The cafe is popular with students.
He became popular after the movie.
The book is popular among young readers.
She is popular because of her kindness.
The new phone model is extremely popular.
extraExampleTranslations: U film chiqqandan keyin mashhur bo‘ldi.

words.definition: Good, hopeful, or showing agreement.
words.definitionUz: Ijobiy — yaxshi, umidvor yoki rozilik bildiruvchi.
words.example1: She always has a positive attitude.
words.example1Translation: U har doim ijobiy munosabatda bo‘ladi.
extraExamples: Thinking positive helps in difficult times.
He is a positive influence on the team.
The meeting had a positive outcome.
She made a positive change in her life.
extraExampleTranslations: Ijobiy fikrlash qiyin paytlarda yordam beradi.

words.definition: Able to be done or achieved.
words.definitionUz: Mumkin — bajarilishi yoki erishilishi mumkin bo‘lgan.
words.example1: It is possible to finish the work today.
words.example2: Anything is possible if you try hard.
words.example2Translation: Agar qattiq harakat qilsangiz, hamma narsa mumkin.
words.example3: Is it possible to change the date?
extraExamples: We made it possible for everyone to attend.
The doctor said full recovery is possible.
It’s possible to learn a language quickly.
There is no possible way to do it alone.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz hammaga ishtirok etish imkonini yaratdik.
Buni yolg‘iz uddalashning hech qanday mumkin yo‘li yo‘q.

words.definition: Belonging to or for one person or group only; not public.
words.definitionUz: Shaxsiy — faqat bitta odam yoki guruhga tegishli; jamoatchilik uchun emas.
words.example1: This is a private conversation.
extraExamples: She works in the private sector.

words.definition: Moving fast or taking a short time.
words.definitionUz: Tez — tez harakatlanadigan yoki qisqa vaqt oladigan.
words.example1: She gave a quick answer.
extraExamples: The service was quick and efficient.
The car is quick and reliable.
Her movements are quick and graceful.

words.definition: Not common; unusual.
words.definitionUz: Noyob — keng tarqalmagan; g‘ayrioddiy.
words.example1: This is a rare opportunity.
words.example2: Snow is rare in this region.
extraExamples: It is rare to see such kindness.
He suffers from a rare disease.
These flowers are rare and beautiful.
Finding a good job is becoming rare.
It was a rare moment of peace.
extraExampleTranslations: Yaxshi ish topish tobora kam uchramoqda.

words.definition: Actually existing; not imaginary.
words.definitionUz: Haqiqiy — haqiqatda mavjud; xayoliy emas.
words.example1: This is a real diamond.
words.example3: I want to see the real problem.
extraExamples: The story is based on real events.

words.definition: Happening or done a short time ago.
words.definitionUz: Yaqinda — qisqa vaqt oldin sodir bo‘lgan yoki qilingan.
words.example1: Have you heard the recent news?
words.example2: Her recent book is very popular.
words.example2Translation: Uning yaqinda chiqqan kitobi juda mashhur.
words.example3: In recent years, technology has improved a lot.
extraExamples: She visited her family in the recent past.
extraExampleTranslations: Yaqinda sodir bo‘lgan voqealar hammasini hayratda qoldirdi.
Kompaniya yaqinda ko‘rilgan foydani e’lon qildi.

words.definition: Important and needing careful thought; not joking.
words.definitionUz: Jiddiy — muhim va ehtiyotkorlik bilan o‘ylashni talab qiladigan; hazil emas.
words.example1: This is a serious problem.
extraExamples: We need to have a serious talk.
She is serious about her career.
The movie is serious and thought-provoking.

words.definition: Like something else but not exactly the same.
words.definitionUz: O‘xshash — boshqa narsaga o‘xshaydigan, lekin bir xil bo‘lmagan.
words.example1: Your bag is similar to mine.
words.example2: The two cities are similar in size.
extraExamples: This situation is similar to last year.
Her dress is similar to the one I saw yesterday.

words.definition: Easy to understand or do; not complicated.
words.definitionUz: Oddiy — tushunish yoki bajarish oson; murakkab bo‘lmagan.
words.example1: The instructions are simple.
extraExamples: He explained it in simple words.
The recipe is simple and delicious.
The design is simple but elegant.
extraExampleTranslations: U buni oddiy so‘zlar bilan tushuntirdi.

words.definition: Achieving what you wanted or intended.
words.definitionUz: Muvaffaqiyatli — xohlagan yoki maqsad qilgan narsangizga erishgan.
words.example1: She is a successful businesswoman.
words.example3: He felt successful after the exam.
words.example3Translation: U imtihondan keyin o‘zini muvaffaqiyatli his qildi.
extraExamples: Hard work leads to successful results.
The team had a successful season.
extraExampleTranslations: Qattiq mehnat muvaffaqiyatli natijalarga olib keladi.

words.definition: Happening quickly and unexpectedly.
words.definitionUz: To‘satdan — tez va kutilmagan tarzda sodir bo‘ladigan.
words.example1: There was a sudden change in the weather.
words.example2Translation: Uning to‘satdan vafoti hammasini hayratda qoldirdi.
extraExamples: The sudden noise scared the children.
A sudden idea came to him.
There was a sudden drop in temperature.
He left in a sudden hurry.

words.definition: Right or appropriate for a particular purpose.
words.definitionUz: Mos — muayyan maqsad uchun to‘g‘ri yoki mos keladigan.
words.example1: This job is suitable for you.
words.example2: The film is not suitable for children.
words.example3: We need a suitable place for the meeting.
extraExamples: The weather is suitable for swimming.
This color is suitable for the room.
He is suitable for the position.
The book is suitable for beginners.
The house is suitable for a large family.

words.definition: Very bad, unpleasant, or shocking.
words.definitionUz: Dahshatli — juda yomon, yoqimsiz yoki hayratlanarli.
words.example1: The food was terrible.
extraExamples: He felt terrible after the news.
extraExampleTranslations: U xabardan keyin o‘zini yomon his qildi.

words.definition: Helping you to do or achieve something.
words.definitionUz: Foydali — biror narsani bajarish yoki erishishga yordam beradigan.
words.example1: This book is very useful.
words.example2: The app is useful for learning languages.
words.example3: She gave me some useful advice.
words.example3Translation: U menga bir necha foydali maslahat berdi.
extraExamples: A dictionary is a useful tool.
He made himself useful in the kitchen.
This skill will be useful in the future.

words.definition: Different kinds or types.
words.definitionUz: Turli — har xil turlar yoki navlar.
words.example1: There are various options to choose from.
words.example2: She has travelled to various countries.
extraExamples: There are various reasons for this.

words.definition: Extremely good or beautiful.
words.definitionUz: Ajoyib — juda yaxshi yoki go‘zal.
words.example1: We had a wonderful time.
extraExamples: They live in a wonderful house.

words.definition: Having a particular value; important or useful enough to deserve something.
words.definitionUz: Arziydi — ma’lum qiymatga ega; biror narsaga loyiq darajada muhim yoki foydali.
words.example1: The book is worth reading.
words.example3: The trip was worth every penny.
extraExamples: Her advice is worth listening to.
The painting is worth a lot of money.

words.definition: Happening often; usual or shared by many people.
words.definitionUz: Oddiy — tez-tez sodir bo‘ladigan; odatiy yoki ko‘pchilik tomonidan baham ko‘riladigan.
words.example1: Colds are very common in winter.
extraExamples: This bird is common in the area.
They come from a common background.

words.definition: Having great power or strength.
words.definitionUz: Kuchli — katta kuch yoki quvvatga ega.
words.example1: He is very strong.
extraExamples: The team is strong this year.
I have a strong feeling about this.
There is a strong connection between them.

words.definition: Based on facts; correct or real.
words.definitionUz: Haqiqat — faktlarga asoslangan; to‘g‘ri yoki haqiqiy.
words.example1: Is this story true?
words.example3: It is true that he left early.
extraExamples: The news turned out to be true.
He remained true to his principles.

words.definition: Happening or done most of the time.
words.definitionUz: Odatdagi — ko‘pincha sodir bo‘ladigan yoki bajariladigan.
words.example1: She took her usual route to work.
words.example2: It is usual to shake hands when meeting someone.
words.example2Translation: Kimdir bilan uchrashganda qo‘l siqish odatiy hol.
extraExamples: He arrived at the usual time.
This is the usual way of doing it.
It’s usual for him to complain.
The food was better than usual.

words.definition: Not wide; limited in space or ideas.
words.definitionUz: Tor — keng bo‘lmagan; joy yoki fikr jihatidan cheklangan.
words.example1: The road is very narrow.
words.example2: She has a narrow view of the world.
words.example2Translation: U dunyoga tor nuqtai nazardan qaraydi.
words.example3: They escaped through a narrow passage.
words.example3Translation: Ular tor o‘tish yo‘lagi orqali qochib qutulishdi.
extraExamples: He won by a narrow margin.
The street is too narrow for cars.
extraExampleTranslations: U oz farq bilan g‘alaba qozondi.

words.definition: Able to wait calmly for a long time or deal with difficulties without complaining.
words.definitionUz: Sabrli — uzoq vaqt tinch kutish yoki qiyinchiliklarni shikoyat qilmasdan bardosh berishga qodir.
words.example1: She is very patient with children.
words.example2: You need to be patient when learning a new language.
words.example2Translation: Yangi til o‘rganayotganda sabrli bo‘lish kerak.
words.example3: The doctor was patient and kind.
extraExamples: Be patient – it will happen soon.
The process is slow but you must be patient.
I’m not a very patient person.
extraExampleTranslations: U barcha savollarga sabr bilan javob berdi.
Jarayon sekin, lekin siz sabrli bo‘lishingiz kerak.

words.definition: To take and use something belonging to someone else and return it later.
words.definitionUz: Qarzga olmoq — boshqa birovning narsasini olib foydalanish va keyin qaytarish.
words.example1: Can I borrow your pen?
words.example2: She borrowed some money from her friend.
words.example2Translation: U do‘stidan bir oz pul qarzga oldi.
words.example3: He borrowed my book last week.
words.example3Translation: U o‘tgan hafta kitobimni qarzga oldi.
extraExamples: Don’t forget to return what you borrow.
I need to borrow a car for the weekend.
She often borrows clothes from her sister.
The library lets you borrow books for two weeks.
He borrowed ideas from other writers.
extraExampleTranslations: Dam olish kunlari uchun mashina qarzga olishim kerak.
U tez-tez singlisidan kiyim qarzga oladi.
Kutubxona kitoblarni ikki haftaga qarzga beradi.
U boshqa yozuvchilardan g‘oyalarni qarzga oldi.
Pul qarzga olish xavfli bo‘lishi mumkin.

words.definition: To take hold of something that is moving.
words.definitionUz: Ushlamoq — harakatdagi narsani qo‘lga olmoq.
words.example1: He caught the ball.
words.example2: She caught the bus just in time.
extraExamples: Did you catch what he said?
We caught the train by a minute.
She caught him looking at her.
He caught his finger in the door.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz poyezdni bir daqiqada yetib oldik.
U uni o‘ziga qarab turganini payqadi.
U barmog‘ini eshik orasiga qistirib oldi.

words.definition: To do something special because of a happy event.
words.definitionUz: Nishonlamoq — baxtli voqea munosabati bilan maxsus ish qilish.
words.example1: We celebrated her birthday with a big party.
words.example1Translation: Biz uning tug‘ilgan kunini katta ziyofat bilan nishonladik.
words.example3: The whole country celebrated the victory.
extraExamples: How do you celebrate New Year?
We should celebrate small successes too.

words.definition: To become or make something different.
words.definitionUz: O‘zgartirmoq — biror narsani boshqacha holatga keltirish yoki o‘zgarish.
words.example1: She changed her mind.
words.example3: I need to change my clothes.
extraExamples: Can you change this for me?
The city has changed a lot.
extraExampleTranslations: Vaqt o‘tishi bilan hamma narsa o‘zgaradi.

words.definition: To look at something to make sure it is correct or safe.
words.definitionUz: Tekshirmoq — biror narsaning to‘g‘ri yoki xavfsiz ekanligini aniqlash uchun ko‘rib chiqish.
words.example1: Please check your answers.
words.example2: He checked the time on his watch.
words.example3: I need to check my email.
extraExamples: Check the oil in the car.
She checked the door was locked.
The doctor checked her blood pressure.
He checked his bag for the keys.

words.definition: To decide which one you want from several possibilities.
words.definitionUz: Tanlamoq — bir necha variantdan qaysi birini xohlayotganingizni hal qilish.
words.example1: She chose the blue dress.
words.example2: It’s hard to choose between them.
words.example3: You can choose any color you like.
extraExamples: He chose to stay at home.
She chose a career in medicine.
They chose him as their leader.
I can’t choose between these two.

words.definition: To bring things together or gather them.
words.definitionUz: Yig‘moq — narsalarni bir joyga keltirish yoki to‘plash.
words.example1: She collects stamps.
words.example2: We need to collect the children from school.
words.example3: He collected his thoughts before speaking.
extraExamples: They are collecting money for charity.
She collected her luggage at the airport.
Rainwater is collected in a tank.
The company collects data from users.

words.definition: Ikki yoki undan ortiq narsani o'xshashlik va farqlarini aniqlash
words.definitionUz: Compare — ikki yoki bir necha narsani, odamni yoki g'oyani bir-biri bilan solishtirib ko'rish.
words.example1: Compare the two pictures.
extraExamples: We compared the results of the two experiments.
It is interesting to compare cultures of different countries.

words.definition: Biror narsadan norozilik bildirish
words.definitionUz: Complain — biror narsadan norozi bo'lib shikoyat qilish yoki gapirish.
words.example1: She always complains about the weather.
words.example1Translation: U har doim ob-havo haqida shikoyat qiladi.
extraExamples: Customers often complain about poor service.
extraExampleTranslations: Mijozlar ko'pincha yomon xizmat haqida shikoyat qilishadi.
Shikoyat qilishni bas qiling va ishlashni boshlang.

words.definition: Biror ishni oxiriga yetkazish
words.definitionUz: Complete — vazifa, loyiha yoki jarayonni to'liq bajarib tugatish.
words.example1: I completed the task.
words.example3: We must complete the project on time.
words.example3Translation: Biz loyihani o'z vaqtida tugatishimiz kerak.
extraExamples: He finally completed his university studies.

words.definition: Ishni yoki harakatni to'xtatmasdan davom ettirish
words.definitionUz: Continue — boshlangan ishni yoki harakatni keyinroq ham bajarishni davom ettirish.
words.example1: Please continue reading.
words.example2: The meeting continued for two hours.
extraExamples: She continued working despite being tired.
extraExampleTranslations: U charchagan bo'lsa ham ishlashni davom ettirdi.

words.definition: Biror narsaning nusxasini olish
words.definitionUz: Copy — matn, rasm yoki faylning nusxasini yaratish yoki ko'chirib olish.
words.example1: Copy the sentence into your notebook.
extraExamples: She copied the recipe from the book.
You can copy and paste the text.
extraExampleTranslations: Matnni copy va paste qilishingiz mumkin.

words.definition: Yangi narsa yaratish yoki hosil qilish
words.definitionUz: Create — yangi narsa, san'at asari, loyiha yoki tizimni yaratish.
words.example1: Artists create beautiful paintings.
extraExamples: The company created many new jobs.
You can create your own story.
extraExampleTranslations: Kompaniya ko'plab yangi ish o'rinlarini yaratdi.

words.definition: Biror narsaga zarar yetkazish
words.definitionUz: Damage — narsani, binoni yoki sog'liqni buzish yoki shikastlash.
words.example1: The storm damaged the roof.
extraExamples: The accident damaged the car badly.
Too much sun can damage your skin.
extraExampleTranslations: Haddan tashqari quyosh teringizga zarar yetkazishi mumkin.

words.definition: Biror narsa haqida tanlov qilish
words.definitionUz: Decide — ikki yoki undan ortiq variantdan birini tanlab qaror chiqarish.
words.example1: I decided to go home.
words.example2: They decided to buy a car.
words.example2Translation: Ular mashina sotib olishga qaror qilishdi.

words.definition: Biror narsani so'zlar bilan ifodalash
words.definitionUz: Describe — odam, joy, voqea yoki tuyg'uni batafsil so'zlab berish.
words.example1: Describe your house.
extraExamples: The witness described the thief in detail.
extraExampleTranslations: U o'z his-tuyg'ularini juda yaxshi tasvirlab berdi.

words.definition: Biror narsani yaxshilash yoki o'stirish
words.definitionUz: Develop — bilim, texnologiya, shaxsiyat yoki loyihani rivojlantirish va takomillashtirish.
words.example1: Develop your skills.
extraExamples: Children develop quickly in the first years.

words.definition: Biror mavzuni birgalikda gapirish
words.definitionUz: Discuss — biror masala yoki g'oyani boshqalar bilan ochiq muhokama qilish.
words.example1: Let's discuss the problem.
extraExamples: The students discussed the book in class.
We need to discuss this matter later.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz bu masalani keyinroq muhokama qilishimiz kerak.

words.definition: Avval noma'lum bo'lgan narsani topish
words.definitionUz: Discover — yangi joy, haqiqat yoki narsani kashf etish va bilib olish.
words.example1: Columbus discovered America.
extraExamples: I discovered an interesting article yesterday.
The team discovered many ancient artifacts.
extraExampleTranslations: Jamoa ko'plab qadimiy buyumlarni kashf qildi.

words.definition: Maxsus holat uchun yaxshi kiyim kiyish
words.definitionUz: Dress up — bayram, ziyofat yoki muhim tadbir uchun chiroyli va rasmiy kiyinish.
words.example1: Dress up for the party.
extraExamples: We dressed up for the wedding ceremony.
You don't need to dress up for this meeting.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz to'y marosimi uchun chiroyli kiyindik.
Bu uchrashuv uchun chiroyli kiyinish shart emas.

words.definition: Biror narsani aniq va tushunarli qilib aytish
words.definitionUz: Explain — murakkab mavzuni oddiy va tushunarli tarzda tushuntirib berish.
words.example1: Can you explain this word?
extraExamples: The teacher explained the lesson very well.

words.definition: Yuqoridan pastga tushish
words.definitionUz: Fall — balandlikdan yiqilish, yoki fasl sifatida kuz.
words.example1: Be careful, don't fall.
extraExamples: She fell in love with him at first sight.
extraExampleTranslations: U birinchi ko'rishdayoq unga oshiq bo'lib qoldi.

words.definition: Birovning orqasidan borish yoki qoidalarga rioya qilish
words.definitionUz: Follow — kimdir yoki biror narsaga ergashish, yoki ko'rsatmalarga amal qilish.
words.example1: Follow me, please.
words.example3Translation: Ko'p odamlar uning maslahatiga amal qilishadi.
extraExamples: The dog followed its owner everywhere.
extraExampleTranslations: It egasini hamma joyda kuzatib bordi.
U moda yo'nalishlarini diqqat bilan kuzatib boradi.

words.definition: Aniq bilmasdan javob berish
words.definitionUz: Guess — to'liq ma'lumotga ega bo'lmasdan biror narsani taxmin qilish.
words.example1: Guess what I bought!
words.example1Translation: Men nima sotib olganimni taxmin qiling!
extraExamples: I guess you are tired after the long trip.
No one could guess the correct answer.
extraExampleTranslations: Hech kim to'g'ri javobni taxmin qila olmadi.

words.definition: Biror voqea yuz berish
words.definitionUz: Happen — tasodifan yoki tabiiy ravishda biror voqea yuz berishi.
words.example1: What happened?
words.example3Translation: Baxtsiz hodisalar hamma joyda sodir bo'lishi mumkin.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu har kimga ba'zida sodir bo'ladi.

words.definition: Jismoniy yoki ruhiy zarar yetkazish
words.definitionUz: Hurt — kimnidir jismonan jarohatlamoq yoki ruhiy jihatdan xafa qilmoq.
words.example1: I hurt my leg.
words.example3: Be careful not to hurt yourself.
extraExamples: I didn't mean to hurt your feelings.

words.definition: Ko'z oldiga keltirish yoki xayol qilish
words.definitionUz: Imagine — biror narsani xayolda ko'rish yoki tasavvur etish.
words.example1: Imagine you are rich.
words.example2Translation: U yerda yashashni tasavvur qila olasizmi?
words.example3Translation: Men bu og'riqni tasavvur qila olmayman.
extraExamples: Try to imagine a world without technology.
She imagined herself as a famous singer.
extraExampleTranslations: Texnologiyasiz dunyoni tasavvur qilishga harakat qiling.
U o'zini mashhur qo'shiqchi sifatida tasavvur qildi.

words.definition: Ichiga olish yoki qo'shish
words.definitionUz: Include — ro'yxat, guruh yoki hisobga boshqa narsalarni ham qo'shish.
words.example1: The price includes tax.
words.example1Translation: Narx soliqni ham o'z ichiga oladi.
words.example3Translation: Jamoa beshta o'yinchini o'z ichiga oladi.
extraExamples: The meal includes soup and salad.
Don't forget to include important details.
extraExampleTranslations: Ovqat sho'rva va salatni o'z ichiga oladi.

words.definition: Miqdorni, darajani yoki hajmni kattalashtirish
words.definitionUz: Increase — son, miqdor, tezlik yoki darajani ko'paytirish yoki oshirish.
words.example1: They increased the price.
extraExamples: The population of the city is increasing rapidly.
extraExampleTranslations: Shahar aholisi tez sur'atlar bilan o'smoqda.

words.definition: Birovni biror tadbirga chaqirish
words.definitionUz: Invite — do'st, oila a'zosi yoki hamkasbni uchrashuv, ziyofat yoki tadbirga taklif qilish.
words.example1: I invited my friends.
words.example2Translation: U meni kechki ovqatga taklif qildi.
words.example3: They invited us to the party.
extraExamples: The company invited him for an interview.

words.definition: Guruhga yoki faoliyatga qo'shilish
words.definitionUz: Join — jamoa, klub, suhbat yoki harakatga qo'shilish.
words.example1: Join our team.
extraExamples: Many students want to join the sports team.

words.definition: Biror narsani o'zida ushlab turish
words.definitionUz: Keep — narsani, sirni yoki odatni saqlab qolish yoki davom ettirish.
words.example1: Keep the secret.

words.definition: Eshikni yoki narsani urib tovush chiqarish
words.definitionUz: Knock — eshikni taqillatib ichkariga kirishga ruxsat so'rash.
words.example1: Knock on the door.
words.example3: He knocked the glass off the table.
extraExamples: Always knock before entering the room.
The car knocked down the sign.
extraExampleTranslations: Xonaga kirishdan oldin har doim taqillating.

words.definition: Biror narsani vaqtincha boshqasiga berish
words.definitionUz: Lend — pul, kitob yoki narsani boshqa odamga vaqtincha foydalanish uchun berish.
words.example1: Can you lend me some money?
words.example1Translation: Menga bir oz pul qarz bera olasizmi?
extraExamples: Please lend me your pen for a minute.

words.definition: Ishni yoki kompaniyani boshqarish
words.definitionUz: Manage — ish, loyiha yoki odamlarni muvaffaqiyatli boshqarish va nazorat qilish.
words.example1: She manages a big company.
words.example3: He managed to finish on time.
words.example3Translation: U o'z vaqtida tugatishga muvaffaq bo'ldi.
extraExamples: The team managed to win the match.
extraExampleTranslations: Ota-onalar uy xo'jaligini ehtiyotkorlik bilan boshqarishadi.

words.definition: Biror narsani qisqacha aytib o'tish
words.definitionUz: Mention — suhbatda biror odam, voqea yoki narsani qisqa qilib tilga olish.
words.example1: Don't mention it.
extraExamples: The teacher mentioned the importance of studying.
Please mention my name in the report.
extraExampleTranslations: Iltimos, hisobotda mening ismimni eslatib o'ting.

words.definition: Biror narsani o'tkazib yuborish yoki sog'inish
words.definitionUz: Miss — uchrashuvni o'tkazib yuborish yoki yaqin odamni sog'inish.
words.example1: I miss you.
extraExamples: He missed his family very much.
We missed the beginning of the movie.

words.definition: Biror narsani berishni yoki qilishni taklif etish
words.definitionUz: Offer — yordam, ish, sovg'a yoki narxni taklif qilish.
words.example1: She offered me a cup of tea.
extraExamples: The shop offered a big discount.
He offered his seat to the old lady.
extraExampleTranslations: U o'z o'rnini kampirga taklif qildi.

words.definition: Tadbir, ish yoki ma'lumotlarni tartibga solish
words.definitionUz: Organise — tadbir, yig'ilish yoki loyihani rejalashtirib, tartibga solish.
words.example1: We organised a party.
extraExamples: I need to organise my files.

words.definition: Biror ishga oldindan tayyorgarlik ko'rish
words.definitionUz: Prepare — imtihon, ovqat, sayohat yoki tadbir uchun oldindan tayyorgarlik ko'rish.
words.example1: Prepare for the exam.
words.example3: We are preparing for the trip.
extraExamples: Always prepare before speaking in public.
extraExampleTranslations: Omma oldida gapirishdan oldin har doim tayyorlaning.

words.definition: Biror narsaning sodir bo'lishiga to'sqinlik qilish
words.definitionUz: Prevent — muammo, kasallik yoki baxtsiz hodisaning oldini olish.
words.example1: We must prevent accidents.
words.example1Translation: Biz baxtsiz hodisalarning oldini olishimiz kerak.
extraExamples: Good planning can prevent many problems.
extraExampleTranslations: Emlashlar og'ir kasalliklarning oldini olishga yordam beradi.
Yaxshi rejalashtirish ko'p muammolarning oldini olishi mumkin.

words.definition: Biror narsani bajarishga so'z berish
words.definitionUz: Promise — biror ishni bajarishga yoki qilmaslikka qat'iy so'z berish.
words.example1: I promise to help you.
words.example1Translation: Men sizga yordam berishga va'da beraman.
words.example2: She promised not to be late.
extraExamples: Parents promise to buy gifts for their children.
Never make a promise you cannot keep.
extraExampleTranslations: Ota-onalar farzandlariga sovg'a sotib olishga va'da berishadi.
Hech qachon bajara olmaydigan va'da bermang.

words.definition: Maqsadga yoki joyga yetib borish
words.definitionUz: Reach — joyga yetib borish yoki muayyan darajaga erishish.
words.example1: We reached the top.
extraExamples: The train reaches the station at 7 pm.
He worked hard to reach his goals.
extraExampleTranslations: U maqsadlariga erishish uchun qattiq mehnat qildi.

words.definition: Biror haqiqatni birdan tushunib yetish
words.definitionUz: Realise — oldin tushunmagan haqiqatni anglab yetish yoki sezish.
words.example1: I realised my mistake.
extraExamples: We realised we were lost in the forest.
She suddenly realised how much time had passed.
extraExampleTranslations: U birdaniga qancha vaqt o'tganini anglab yetdi.

words.definition: Biror narsani olish yoki qabul qilish
words.definitionUz: Receive — xat, sovg'a, xabar yoki mukofotni qabul qilib olish.
words.example1: I received your letter.
extraExamples: The hospital receives many patients every day.
extraExampleTranslations: Kasalxona har kuni ko'p bemorlarni qabul qiladi.

words.definition: Avval ko'rgan narsani yoki odamni tanib olish
words.definitionUz: Recognise — oldin ko'rgan odamni, narsani yoki ovozini tanib olish.
words.example1: I didn't recognise you.
extraExamples: He recognised the importance of education.
The police recognised the suspect from the photo.

words.definition: Miqdorni, narxni yoki hajmni kamaytirish
words.definitionUz: Reduce — xarajat, og'irlik, tezlik yoki muammoni kamaytirish.
words.example1: Reduce the price.
extraExampleTranslations: Jismoniy mashqlar stressni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: To say no to something or not accept it.
words.definitionUz: Rad etmoq — biror taklif yoki narsani qabul qilmaslik yoki yo'q deyish.
words.example1: She refused the invitation because she was busy.
words.example1Translation: U bandligi uchun taklifni rad etdi.
words.example2: He refused to help with the work.
words.example2Translation: U ishga yordam berishdan bosh tortdi.
words.example3: The company refused to lower the price.
extraExamples: I had to refuse the offer.
They refused to answer the question.
Don't refuse help when you need it.
She refused to believe the news.
extraExampleTranslations: Men taklifni rad etishga majbur bo'ldim.
U sovg'ani muloyimlik bilan rad etdi.
Ular savolga javob berishdan bosh tortdilar.

words.definition: To help someone remember something.
words.definitionUz: Eslatmoq — birovga biror narsani eslatib qo'yish.
words.example1: Please remind me to call her tomorrow.
words.example1Translation: Iltimos, ertaga unga qo'ng'iroq qilishni menga eslat.
words.example2: The song reminds me of my childhood.
words.example3: He reminded the students about the test.
extraExamples: This photo reminds me of you.
She reminded him to take his medicine.
The smell reminds me of home.
Don't forget to remind the team.
He reminded her of their agreement.
The teacher reminded everyone to be on time.

words.definition: To say or do something again.
words.definitionUz: Takrorlamoq — biror narsani yana bir marta aytish yoki qilish.
words.example1: Could you repeat the question, please?
words.example3: The teacher made us repeat the words.
extraExamples: Please don't repeat what I said.
The song repeats the chorus many times.
He kept repeating the same story.
extraExampleTranslations: Qo'shiq xor qismini ko'p marta takrorlaydi.
U bir xil hikoyani qayta-qayta aytardi.

words.definition: To answer someone or something.
words.definitionUz: Javob bermoq — birovning savoli yoki xabariga javob berish.
words.example1: Please reply to my email soon.
words.example1Translation: Iltimos, elektron xatimga tezroq javob bering.
words.example2: He didn't reply to my message.
extraExamples: I replied to all the questions.
He replied that he was busy.
She replied in a soft voice.
extraExampleTranslations: U yumshoq ovoz bilan javob berdi.

words.definition: To give information about something that has happened.
words.definitionUz: Hisobot bermoq — sodir bo'lgan voqea haqida ma'lumot berish.
words.example1: The manager will report the results tomorrow.
words.example1Translation: Rahbar natijalar haqida ertaga hisobot beradi.
words.example2: She reported the accident to the police.
words.example2Translation: U avtohalokat haqida politsiyaga xabar berdi.
extraExamples: He reported seeing a strange man.
She reports directly to the boss.
The weather report says it will rain.
extraExampleTranslations: O'quvchilar har qanday muammoni bildirishlari kerak.
U g'alati odamni ko'rganini xabar qildi.

words.definition: To come or go back to a place or person.
words.definitionUz: Qaytmoq — biror joyga yoki shaxsga qaytib kelish yoki borish.
words.example1: He will return from vacation next week.
words.example1Translation: U dam olishdan keyingi haftada qaytadi.
words.example2: Please return the book to the library.
words.example3: She returned the money she borrowed.
extraExamples: He returned to his old job.
The pain returned after some time.

words.definition: To appear to be something or give the impression of being.
words.definitionUz: Ko'rinmoq — biror narsaga o'xshab ko'rinish yoki taassurot qoldirish.
words.example1: She seems happy today.
words.example2: It seems that we are late.
extraExamples: Things are not always what they seem.
It seems we have a problem.
extraExampleTranslations: Hamma narsa har doim ko'rinadiganidek bo'lavermaydi.

words.definition: To give part of something to others or use something together.
words.definitionUz: Ulashmoq — biror narsaning bir qismini boshqalarga berish yoki birga foydalanish.
words.example1: Can I share your umbrella?
words.example2: She shared her story with the class.
extraExamples: He shared the prize with his partner.
We shared a taxi to the airport.
The company shares profits with employees.
Don't forget to share this video.
extraExampleTranslations: U onlayn fotosuratlar ulashishni yaxshi ko'radi.

words.definition: To say something very loudly.
words.definitionUz: Baqirmoq — biror narsani juda baland ovozda aytish.
words.example1: Don't shout in the library.
words.example3: He shouted with joy when he won.
extraExamples: The teacher shouted at the noisy students.
We had to shout to be heard.
He shouted my name from across the street.
extraExampleTranslations: U ko'chaning narigi tomonidan ismini baqirdi.

words.definition: To close something.
words.definitionUz: Yopmoq — biror narsani yopish.
words.example1: Please shut the door.
words.example2: She shut her eyes and made a wish.
extraExamples: Don't shut me out of your life.

words.definition: To find an answer or solution to a problem.
words.definitionUz: Hal qilmoq — muammoning yechimini topish.
words.example1: We need to solve this problem quickly.
words.example1Translation: Bu muammoni tez hal qilishimiz kerak.
extraExamples: Math problems are hard to solve.
They are trying to solve world hunger.
The team solved the case together.
extraExampleTranslations: Ular dunyo ochligini hal qilishga harakat qilmoqda.
Ta'lim ko'p muammolarni hal qilishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: To propose an idea or plan for someone to consider.
words.definitionUz: Tavsiya qilmoq — biror fikr yoki rejani taklif qilish.
words.example1: I suggest we leave early.
extraExamples: The teacher suggested reading more books.
extraExampleTranslations: O'qituvchi ko'proq kitob o'qishni tavsiya qildi.
Men sizdan kechirim so'rashni tavsiya qilaman.
U soat 6 da uchrashishni taklif qildi.

words.definition: To be appropriate or convenient for someone.
words.definitionUz: Mos kelmoq — biror kishiga mos yoki qulay bo'lish.
words.example1: This job suits me perfectly.
words.example1Translation: Bu ish menga juda mos keladi.
words.example2: The climate here doesn't suit her.
words.example2Translation: Bu yerdagi iqlim unga mos kelmaydi.
extraExamples: Early morning meetings don't suit him.
The new schedule suits the team.
The hot weather suits the plants.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu reja bizning ehtiyojlarimizga mos keladi.

words.definition: To help or encourage someone or something.
words.definitionUz: Qo'llab-quvvatlamoq — biror kishi yoki narsaga yordam berish yoki rag'batlantirish.
words.example1: My family supports me in everything.

words.definition: To think that something is true or likely.
words.definitionUz: Taxmin qilmoq — biror narsa haqiqat yoki ehtimol deb hisoblash.
words.example1: I suppose you are right.
words.example2: Suppose it rains, what will we do?
words.example3: She is supposed to arrive at 5 pm.
words.example3Translation: U soat 5 da kelishi kerak edi.
extraExamples: He is supposed to call me.
I don't suppose you know the answer?
We are supposed to wear uniforms.
extraExampleTranslations: U menga qo'ng'iroq qilishi kerak edi.

words.definition: To try a small amount of food or drink to see if it is good.
words.definitionUz: Tatib ko'rmoq — ovqat yoki ichimlikning ozgina qismini yaxshiligini bilish uchun sinab ko'rish.
words.example1: Taste this soup and tell me if it needs salt.
words.example1Translation: Bu sho'rvani tatib ko'ring va tuz kerakmi, ayting.
words.example2: She tasted the cake and smiled.
words.example2Translation: U tortni tatib ko'rib tabassum qildi.
extraExamples: Would you like to taste it?
She doesn't like the taste of coffee.
The fruit tastes sweet and juicy.
extraExampleTranslations: U vinoni ehtiyotkorlik bilan tatib ko'rdi.
Xizmat qilishdan oldin sousni tatib ko'ring.
Meva shirin va suvli ta'mga ega.

words.definition: To put your hand or finger on something.
words.definitionUz: Tegmoq — qo'l yoki barmoq bilan biror narsaga tegish.
words.example1: Don't touch the hot stove.
extraExamples: He touched the ball with his head.
She touched the screen to open the app.
extraExampleTranslations: U ilovani ochish uchun ekranga tegdi.

words.definition: To change words from one language to another.
words.definitionUz: Tarjima qilmoq — so'zlarni bir tildan boshqa tilga o'tkazish.
words.example1: Can you translate this sentence into Uzbek?
words.example1Translation: Bu jumlani o'zbek tiliga tarjima qila olasizmi?
words.example2: She translated the book from English to Russian.
words.example2Translation: U kitobni ingliz tilidan rus tiliga tarjima qildi.
words.example3: The app helps translate words quickly.
words.example3Translation: Ilova so'zlarni tez tarjima qilishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: The meaning can change when translated.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu so'zni menga tarjima qilib bering.

words.definition: To stop a machine or device from working.
words.definitionUz: O'chirmoq — mashina yoki qurilmani ishlashini to'xtatish.
words.example1: Please turn off the lights.
words.example2: Don't forget to turn off the TV.
extraExamples: Turn off your phone during the meeting.
Always turn off the computer properly.
Turn off the stove after cooking.

words.definition: To start a machine or device.
words.definitionUz: Yoqmoq — mashina yoki qurilmani ishga tushirish.
words.example1: Turn on the light, it's dark.
words.example3: Can you turn on the radio?
extraExamples: Turn on your camera for the meeting.
Don't turn on the TV now.

words.definition: To make something more modern or provide new information.
words.definitionUz: Yangilamoq — biror narsani zamonaviyroq qilish yoki yangi ma'lumot berish.
words.example1: I need to update my phone.
words.example2: Please update me on the project.
words.example2Translation: Iltimos, loyiha haqida meni yangilab turing.
extraExamples: The news was updated every hour.
He updated the team on the changes.
Update your address in the system.
The map was updated last month.

words.definition: To stay in one place until someone or something arrives.
words.definitionUz: Kutmoq — kimdir yoki biror narsa kelguncha bir joyda qolish.
words.example1: I am waiting for the bus.
words.example3: She waited for her friend for an hour.
extraExamples: Don't wait for me if I'm late.
We are waiting for the results.
He waited for the right moment.
The children waited for their parents.
I can't wait for the holidays.
She is waiting for a reply.

words.definition: To tell someone about possible danger or problem.
words.definitionUz: Ogohlantirmoq — birovni mumkin bo'lgan xavf yoki muammo haqida ogohlantirish.
words.example1: The sign warns about danger.
words.example2: She warned him not to go there.
words.example2Translation: U unga u yerga bormaslikni ogohlantirdi.
words.example3: The doctor warned about the side effects.
extraExamples: The weather forecast warns of storms.
Parents warn their children about strangers.
She warned me not to touch it.
The report warns of serious risks.
extraExampleTranslations: Men sizni bu haqida ogohlantirgan edim.

words.definition: To use something carelessly or without purpose.
words.definitionUz: Isrof qilmoq — biror narsani bexuda yoki maqsadsiz sarflash.
words.example1: Don't waste your time.
words.example2: She wasted a lot of money on clothes.
words.example2Translation: U kiyimlarga ko'p pul isrof qildi.
extraExamples: The meeting was a waste of time.

words.definition: To measure how heavy something is.
words.definitionUz: Og'irligini o'lchamoq — biror narsaning og'irligini aniqlash.
words.example1: The doctor weighed the baby.
extraExamples: The suitcase is too heavy to weigh.
The decision weighs heavily on her.
extraExampleTranslations: U har kuni ertalab o'zini tortardi.
Bu qaror uning ustida og'ir yuk bo'lib turibdi.

words.definition: To feel anxious about something.
words.definitionUz: Xavotirlanmoq — biror narsa haqida bezovta bo'lish yoki tashvishlanish.
words.example1: Don't worry about me.
words.example2: She worries too much about small things.
words.example2Translation: U mayda narsalar haqida haddan tashqari xavotirlanadi.
words.example3: I worry when you are late.
extraExamples: There is nothing to worry about.
Don't worry, everything will be fine.
She stopped worrying and started acting.
I worry that we might be late.
extraExampleTranslations: U xavotirlanishni to'xtatib, harakat qila boshladi.

words.definition: Completely different or on the other side.
words.definitionUz: Qarama-qarshi — butunlay boshqacha yoki narigi tomonda bo'lgan.
words.example1: They live on the opposite side of the street.
words.example2: Black is the opposite of white.
extraExamples: What is the opposite of happy?
The hotel is opposite the park.
His answer was the opposite of what I expected.
The opposite house is for sale.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning javobi men kutganimning teskarisi edi.

words.definition: The place where two lines, walls, or roads meet.
words.definitionUz: Burchak — ikki chiziq, devor yoki yo'lning tutashgan joyi.
words.example1: The shop is on the corner of the street.
extraExamples: The cat is hiding in the corner.
There is a cafe around the corner.
He hit his head on the corner of the table.
The opposite corner of the room.
She lives just around the corner.
They met at the street corner.

words.definition: An open area in a town or city with buildings around it.
words.definitionUz: Maydon — shahar yoki qishloqdagi atrofida binolar joylashgan ochiq hudud.
words.example1: We met in the town square.
words.example2: The square was full of people.
words.example3: There is a fountain in the square.
extraExamples: The market is in the main square.
A big event was held in the square.
The square is very beautiful at night.
They sat on a bench in the square.

words.definition: A building where objects of historical, scientific, or artistic interest are kept and shown.
words.definitionUz: Muzey — tarixiy, ilmiy yoki badiiy ahamiyatga ega buyumlar saqlanadigan va ko'rsatiladigan bino.
words.example1: We visited the history museum.
words.example2: The museum is open every day.
words.example3: She works at the art museum.
extraExamples: The museum has many old paintings.
Entrance to the museum is free.
They went to the science museum.
The museum is closed on Mondays.
A new museum opened in the city.
Visitors can take photos in the museum.
The museum exhibit was very interesting.

words.definition: A building where plays and other performances are shown.
words.definitionUz: Teatr — pyesalar va boshqa tomoshalar ko'rsatiladigan bino.
words.example1: We went to the theatre last night.
words.example2: The theatre was full of people.
words.example3: She loves acting in the theatre.
extraExamples: The new theatre is very modern.
Tickets for the theatre are expensive.
They performed at the National Theatre.
She works as a cleaner in the theatre.
The theatre season starts in autumn.
We have tickets for the theatre tomorrow.

words.definition: A place where movies are shown.
words.definitionUz: Kinoteatr — filmlar ko'rsatiladigan joy.
words.example1: We are going to the cinema tonight.
words.example2: The cinema is near the station.
words.example3: What movie is showing at the cinema?
extraExamples: She works at the local cinema.
We watched a comedy at the cinema.
The new cinema has comfortable seats.
Tickets for the cinema are sold online.
The cinema is closed on Mondays.
He loves going to the cinema.

words.definition: A place where you can send letters and parcels.
words.definitionUz: Pochta bo'limi — xat va posilkalar jo'natish mumkin bo'lgan joy.
words.example1: I need to go to the post office.
words.example2: The post office is open until 6 pm.
words.example3: She works at the post office.
extraExamples: The post office is near the bank.
Send the letter from the post office.
There is a long queue at the post office.
He sent a package at the post office.
The post office delivers mail every day.
The nearest post office is two blocks away.
extraExampleTranslations: Pochta bo'limi har kuni xatni yetkazib beradi.
Eng yaqin pochta bo'limi ikki ko'cha narida.

words.definition: The office of the local police.
words.definitionUz: Politsiya bo'limi — mahalliy politsiyaning idorasi.
words.example1: She went to the police station to report the theft.
words.example1Translation: U o'g'irlik haqida xabar berish uchun politsiya bo'limiga bordi.
words.example2: The police station is open 24 hours.
words.example3: The nearest police station is 1 km away.
words.example3Translation: Eng yaqin politsiya bo'limi 1 km narida.
extraExamples: He works at the police station.
We need to go to the police station.
The police station is busy today.
Report the accident at the police station.
There is a police station in every district.
She visited the police station yesterday.
The police station has a lost and found.
extraExampleTranslations: Avtohalokat haqida politsiya bo'limida xabar bering.
Har bir tumanda politsiya bo'limi bor.
Politsiya bo'limida topilgan buyumlar bo'limi bor.

words.definition: A building where firefighters work and keep their equipment.
words.definitionUz: O't o'chirish bo'limi — o't o'chiruvchilar ishlaydigan va jihozlarini saqlaydigan bino.
words.example1: The fire station is near our school.
words.example2: We visited the fire station on a school trip.
words.example2Translation: Biz maktab ekskursiyasida o't o'chirish bo'limiga bordik.
words.example3: Call the fire station if there is a fire.
words.example3Translation: Agar yong'in chiqsa, o't o'chirish bo'limiga qo'ng'iroq qiling.
extraExamples: The fire station has big red trucks.
Firefighters live at the fire station.
The fire station is always ready.
We can hear the siren from the fire station.
The new fire station is very modern.
He wants to work at the fire station.
extraExampleTranslations: O't o'chirish bo'limida katta qizil mashinalar bor.
O't o'chiruvchilar o't o'chirish bo'limida yashaydi.
O't o'chirish bo'limi doim tayyor turadi.
O't o'chirish bo'limidan sirena ovozini eshitamiz.
Yangi o't o'chirish bo'limi juda zamonaviy.
U o't o'chirish bo'limida ishlashni xohlaydi.
O't o'chirish bo'limi tez javob berdi.

words.definition: A shop where medicines are sold.
words.definitionUz: Dorixona — dorilar sotiladigan do'kon.
words.example1: I need to go to the pharmacy.
words.example3: She bought medicine at the pharmacy.
extraExamples: The nearest pharmacy is two blocks away.
He works as a pharmacist in the pharmacy.
The pharmacy is next to the hospital.
You can get prescriptions at the pharmacy.
She asked the pharmacy for advice.
extraExampleTranslations: Eng yaqin dorixona ikki ko'cha narida.
Dorixonada retsept bo'yicha dorilarni olishingiz mumkin.

words.definition: A building where cars are kept or repaired.
words.definitionUz: Garaj — mashinalar saqlanadigan yoki ta'mirlanadigan bino.
words.example1: The car is in the garage.
words.example3: We need to take the car to the garage.
extraExamples: The garage is full of tools.
She parked the car in the garage.
The garage repaired my car quickly.
There is a garage near the house.
He built a garage for his collection.
extraExampleTranslations: U o'z kollektsiyasi uchun garaj qurdi.

words.definition: An area where cars can be parked.
words.definitionUz: Avtoturargoh — mashinalarni qo'yish mumkin bo'lgan hudud.
words.example1: The car park is full.
words.example2: Park your car in the car park.
words.example3: There is a big car park near the mall.
words.example3Translation: Savdo markazi yaqinida katta avtoturargoh bor.
extraExamples: She found a space in the car park.
The underground car park is convenient.
Don't forget where you parked in the car park.
The car park is open 24 hours.
There are many cars in the car park.
The car park is behind the building.

words.definition: A structure built over a river, road, or railway to allow people and vehicles to cross.
words.definitionUz: Ko'prik — daryo, yo'l yoki temir yo'l ustidan odamlar va transport vositalari o'tishi uchun qurilgan inshoot.
words.example1: The bridge crosses the river.
words.example2: We walked across the old bridge.
words.example3: The new bridge is very long.
extraExamples: The bridge is closed for repairs.
There is heavy traffic on the bridge.
They built a bridge between the two towns.
The Golden Gate Bridge is famous.
The bridge connects the two sides.
A small bridge crosses the stream.
extraExampleTranslations: Ular ikki shahar o'rtasida ko'prik qurdilar.

words.definition: Something that you do for enjoyment or as part of your work.
words.definitionUz: Faoliyat — o'yin-kulgi yoki ish doirasida bajaradigan ish.
words.example1: Swimming is my favorite activity.
words.example2: The school has many after-school activities.
words.example2Translation: Maktabda ko'p maktabdan keyingi tadbirlar bor.
words.example3: Physical activity is good for health.
extraExamples: Outdoor activities are popular in summer.
extraExampleTranslations: Kundalik faoliyat sizni sport holatida saqlaydi.

words.definition: Qalam yoki ruchka bilan tasvir yaratish
words.definitionUz: Rasm chizish — qo'lda qalam yordamida suratlar yaratish san'ati.
words.example1: She is good at drawing.
extraExampleTranslations: U har kuni rasm chizishni mashq qiladi.

words.definition: Bo'yoqlar yordamida san'at asari yaratish
words.definitionUz: Bo'yoq bilan chizish — ranglar yordamida rasmlar yaratish.
words.example1: She loves painting.
words.example1Translation: U bo'yoq bilan chizishni yaxshi ko'radi.
words.example3: The painting is on the wall.
extraExampleTranslations: Bo'yoq bilan chizish uning sevimli hobbisi.

words.definition: Kamera yordamida suratga olish san'ati
words.definitionUz: Fotografiya — kamera bilan go'zal lahzalarni suratga olish.
words.example1: He studies photography.
extraExamples: He has a talent for photography.

words.definition: Turli narsalarni yig'ish mashg'uloti
words.definitionUz: To'plash — tanga, markalar yoki boshqa narsalarni yig'ish hobbisi.
words.example1: My hobby is collecting stamps.
extraExamples: He spends time collecting old items.
extraExampleTranslations: U eski narsalarni to'plashga vaqt sarflaydi.

words.definition: Tabiatda chodirda yashash
words.definitionUz: Lagerda qolish — tog' yoki o'rmonda chodirda dam olish.
words.example1: We went camping last weekend.
words.example1Translation: Biz o'tgan dam olish kunida lagerda bo'ldik.
extraExampleTranslations: Lagerda qolish omon qolish ko'nikmalarini o'rgatadi.

words.definition: Baliq tutish mashg'uloti
words.definitionUz: Baliq ovlash — daryo yoki ko'lda baliq tutish.
words.example1: He goes fishing every Sunday.
words.example1Translation: U har yakshanba baliq ovlashga boradi.
words.example3Translation: Biz baliq ovlashda ko'p baliq tutdik.
extraExamples: She enjoys fishing with her father.
extraExampleTranslations: U otasi bilan baliq ovlashni yoqtiradi.

words.definition: Tabiatda piyoda sayr qilish
words.definitionUz: Tog'da yurish — tog' yoki o'rmonda piyoda sayohat qilish.
words.example1: Hiking is good exercise.
words.example2: We went hiking in the mountains.
extraExamples: Proper shoes are important for hiking.
extraExampleTranslations: Tog'da yurish tabiatni kashf etishga yordam beradi.
Tog'da yurish uchun qulay poyabzal muhim.

words.definition: O'yindagi ochkolar soni
words.definitionUz: Hisob — musobaqa yoki o'yindagi natija.
words.example1: What is the score?
extraExamples: Our team has a high score.

words.definition: Ikki jamoa o'rtasidagi musobaqa
words.definitionUz: O'yin — sport musobaqasi, masalan futbol o'yini.
words.example1: The match starts soon.
extraExamples: The football match was on TV.

words.definition: O'yinda teng natija
words.definitionUz: Durang — ikki tomon ham bir xil ochko olgan holat.
words.example1: The game ended in a draw.
extraExamples: Neither team won, it was a draw.
extraExampleTranslations: Hech bir jamoa yutmadi, durang bo'ldi.

words.definition: Ovoz bilan musiqa ijro etish
words.definitionUz: Qoshiq aytish — ovoz yordamida qo'shiq kuylash.
words.example1: She loves singing.
extraExamples: Singing in the choir is fun.

words.definition: Kitob yoki matnni o'qib tushunish
words.definitionUz: O'qish — kitoblar va matnlarni o'qib bilim olish.
words.example1: Reading is important.

words.definition: Biror sabab sababli
words.definitionUz: Tufayli — voqea sodir bo'lishining sababini bildiradi.
words.example1: We stayed home because of rain.
words.example2: Because of you, I am happy.
words.example3: The match was cancelled because of weather.
extraExamples: Because of hard work, she succeeded.
He was late because of traffic.
extraExampleTranslations: Qattiq mehnat tufayli u muvaffaqiyat qozondi.

words.definition: Tushuntirish uchun misol keltirish
words.definitionUz: Masalan — fikrni aniqroq tushuntirish uchun misol berish.
words.example1: I like fruits, for example apples.
extraExamples: She speaks languages, for example English.
extraExampleTranslations: U tillarda gapiradi, masalan ingliz tilida.

words.definition: Qarama-qarshi fikrni bildirish
words.definitionUz: Ammo — oldingi fikrga qaramay yangi holatni aytish.
words.example1: It is expensive. However, it is good.
words.example2: He tried hard. However, he failed.
words.example2Translation: U qattiq harakat qildi. Ammo muvaffaqiyatsiz bo'ldi.
words.example3Translation: Ammo biz yana urinib ko'rishimiz mumkin.
extraExamples: The weather was bad. However, we enjoyed the trip.
She is young. However, she is very talented.
extraExampleTranslations: Ob-havo yomon edi. Ammo biz sayohatdan zavq oldik.

words.definition: Bir narsaning o'rniga boshqasini
words.definitionUz: O'rniga — rejalashtirilgan narsani almashtirish.
words.example1: I will go instead of you.
extraExamples: He chose tea instead of coffee.
Instead of watching TV, read a book.

words.definition: Qarama-qarshi holatni bildirish
words.definitionUz: Garchi — kutilmagan qarama-qarshilikni ko'rsatish.
words.example1: Although it rained, we went out.
words.example1Translation: Yomg'ir yog'gan bo'lsa ham, biz chiqdik.
words.example2: Although he is tired, he works.
words.example3: Although expensive, it is worth it.
extraExamples: Although she is young, she is wise.
Although it was difficult, we succeeded.
extraExampleTranslations: Qiyin bo'lsa ham, biz muvaffaqiyat qozondik.

words.definition: Shart bajarilmasa
words.definitionUz: Agar... bo'lmasa — muayyan shart bajarilmasa natija o'zgarishini bildiradi.
words.example1: I will go unless it rains.
words.example2: Don't call unless it is important.
words.example3: Unless you study, you won't pass.
extraExamples: We will win unless they play better.
Unless you hurry, we will be late.

words.definition: Haqiqiy holatni bildirish
words.definitionUz: Aslida — fikrni to'g'rilash yoki haqiqatni aytish uchun.
words.example1: Actually, I like it.

words.definition: To'liq bo'lmagan holat
words.definitionUz: Deyarli — yaqin, lekin to'liq emas.
words.example1: It is almost finished.

words.definition: Barchasidan tashqari bitta
words.definitionUz: Bundan tashqari — ro'yxatdan bir narsani chiqarib tashlash.
words.example1: Everyone except John.
words.example2: I like all fruits except bananas.
words.example2Translation: Men barcha mevalarni yoqtiraman, banandan tashqari.
words.example3: Except for the rain, it was good.
extraExamples: The shop is open every day except Sunday.
Except him, all passed the test.
extraExampleTranslations: Do'kon yakshanbadan tashqari har kuni ochiq.

words.definition: Alohida darajada
words.definitionUz: Ayniqsa — biror narsani boshqalardan ko'ra ko'proq ta'kidlash.
words.example1: I like sports, especially football.
extraExamples: She is good at languages, especially English.
The food is delicious, especially the dessert.
extraExampleTranslations: U tillarda yaxshi, ayniqsa ingliz tilida.

words.definition: Uzoq kutgandan keyin
words.definitionUz: Nihoyat — biror narsa uzoq vaqtdan keyin sodir bo'lishi.
words.example1: Finally, we arrived.

words.definition: Ko'pincha sodir bo'ladigan holat
words.definitionUz: Odatda — umumiy qoida yoki odat bo'yicha.
words.example1: Generally, I wake up early.
extraExamples: Generally speaking, it is a good idea.
The weather is generally warm here.

words.definition: Hech qanday kechikishsiz
words.definitionUz: Darhol — bir zumda, tezda.
words.example1: Come immediately.

words.definition: Haqiqatni aniqlashtirish
words.definitionUz: Aslida — oldingi fikrni to'g'rilash yoki chuqurlashtirish.
words.example1: In fact, it is true.
words.example2: He is, in fact, very kind.
extraExamples: In fact, she won the prize.
It was, in fact, a mistake.

words.definition: Juda yaqin holat
words.definitionUz: Deyarli — deyarli to'liq, lekin ozgina kam.
words.example1: It is nearly time.

words.definition: Boshqa holatda
words.definitionUz: Aks holda — agar shunday bo'lmasa natija boshqacha bo'lishi.
words.example1: Hurry, otherwise we will be late.
words.example2: Study hard, otherwise you will fail.
words.example2Translation: Qattiq o'qing, aks holda muvaffaqiyatsiz bo'lasiz.
words.example3: It is good, otherwise I would not buy it.
extraExamples: Take an umbrella, otherwise you will get wet.
extraExampleTranslations: Soyabon oling, aks holda ho'l bo'lasiz.

words.definition: Narsalarni tartibga solish
words.definitionUz: Tartib — buyumlar yoki rejani ma'lum tartibda joylashtirish.
words.example1: The arrangement is good.
extraExamples: We made arrangements for the trip.

words.definition: Biror narsaga qaratilgan fikr
words.definitionUz: E'tibor — biror narsaga diqqatni qaratish.
words.example1: Pay attention.
extraExamples: The teacher has the students' attention.

words.definition: Bir necha variantdan birini tanlash
words.definitionUz: Tanlov — mavjud variantlardan birini afzal ko'rish.
words.example1: It is a good choice.
extraExamples: The best choice is to study.

words.definition: Bir maqsadda birlashgan guruh
words.definitionUz: Klub — bir xil qiziqishdagi odamlar birlashmasi.
words.example1: I joined the club.
extraExamples: She is a member of the music club.

words.definition: G'olib chiqish uchun raqobat
words.definitionUz: Musobaqa — bir necha ishtirokchi o'rtasidagi bellashuv.
words.example1: The competition is tough.
extraExamples: There is a lot of competition.

words.definition: Xalqning urf-odatlari va san'ati
words.definitionUz: Madaniyat — bir xalqning urf-odatlari, san'ati va qadriyatlari.
words.example1: I like learning about culture.
extraExampleTranslations: Sayohat turli madaniyatlarni tushunishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Biror narsani tanlash yoki hal qilish
words.definitionUz: Qaror — muammoni hal qilish yoki yo'l tanlash.
words.example1: Make a decision.
extraExamples: We need to take a decision soon.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz tez orada qaror qabul qilishimiz kerak.

words.definition: Biror narsani so'z bilan ifodalash
words.definitionUz: Tavsif — narsaning ko'rinishi yoki xususiyatlarini batafsil aytib berish.
words.example1: Give a description.
extraExamples: The police need a description of the man.
Her description of the trip was interesting.

words.definition: Ikki narsa o'rtasidagi o'xshamaslik
words.definitionUz: Farq — ikki narsaning bir-biridan farqli jihatlari.
words.example1: What is the difference?

words.definition: Ikki nuqta orasidagi uzunlik
words.definitionUz: Masofa — bir joydan ikkinchi joygacha bo'lgan masofa.
words.example1: It is a long distance.

words.definition: Kutilmagan xavfli vaziyat
words.definitionUz: Favqulodda holat — tez yordam talab qiladigan vaziyat.
words.example1: Call emergency services.

words.definition: Muhim sodir bo'ladigan holat
words.definitionUz: Voqea — rejalashtirilgan yoki kutilmagan muhim holat.
words.example1: The event starts at 6.

words.definition: Knowledge or skill gained from doing something.
words.definitionUz: Biror ishni qilish orqali olingan bilim yoki ko'nikma.
words.example1: She has a lot of experience in teaching English.
words.example1Translation: U ingliz tilini o'qitishda katta tajribaga ega.
words.example2: Traveling gives you valuable life experience.
words.example2Translation: Sayohat sizga qimmatli hayotiy tajriba beradi.
words.example3: He learned from his bad experience.
words.example3Translation: U o'zining yomon tajribasidan saboq oldi.
extraExamples: It was a wonderful experience for everyone.
She shared her experience with the class.
Lack of experience can be a problem.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu ish oldingi tajribani talab qiladi.
Bu hamma uchun ajoyib tajriba bo'ldi.
U sinf bilan o'z tajribasini baham ko'rdi.

words.definition: Something that is known to be true.
words.definitionUz: Haqiqat ekanligi ma'lum bo'lgan narsa.
words.example1: It is a fact that the Earth is round.
words.example2: She checked the facts before writing the report.
words.example2Translation: U hisobot yozishdan oldin faktlarni tekshirdi.
words.example3: The fact is, we need to work harder.
words.example3Translation: Haqiqat shuki, biz qattiqroq ishlashimiz kerak.
extraExamples: Based on the facts, he is innocent.
I know that for a fact.

words.definition: A celebration or event with performances and activities.
words.definitionUz: Tomoshalar va tadbirlar bilan o'tkaziladigan bayram yoki tadbir.
words.example1: We went to the music festival last summer.
words.example1Translation: O'tgan yozda biz musiqa festivaliga bordik.
words.example2: The city holds a big food festival every year.
words.example2Translation: Shahar har yili katta oziq-ovqat festivalini o'tkazadi.
words.example3: She performed at the international film festival.
extraExamples: The Spring Festival is very important in China.
Many tourists come for the cultural festival.
The festival lasted for three days.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'p sayyohlar madaniy festival uchun keladi.

words.definition: The shape of something or an official document to fill.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsaning shakli yoki to'ldiriladigan rasmiy hujjat.
words.example1: Please fill out this application form.
words.example2: The cake was in the form of a heart.
words.example3: Different forms of energy exist in nature.
extraExamples: She is in good form for the competition.
The word has many different forms.
You need to sign the form.
This is a new form of art.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu so'zning ko'p turli shakllari bor.

words.definition: The time that will come after the present.
words.definitionUz: Hozirdan keyin keladigan vaqt.
words.example1: We should think about our future.
words.example2: She has a bright future in medicine.
words.example2Translation: Uning tibbiyot sohasida yorqin kelajagi bor.
words.example3: What are your plans for the future?
extraExamples: He is worried about his future.
Let's build a better future together.

words.definition: Something given to someone as a present.
words.definitionUz: Birovga sovg'a sifatida beriladigan narsa.
words.example1: She received many gifts on her birthday.
words.example1Translation: U tug'ilgan kunida ko'p sovg'alar oldi.
words.example2: This watch was a gift from my father.
words.example3: He has a gift for music.
extraExamples: Thank you for the lovely gift.
They brought gifts for the children.

words.definition: Something you want to achieve.
words.definitionUz: Siz erishmoqchi bo'lgan narsa.
words.example1: My goal is to learn English fluently.
words.example1Translation: Mening maqsadim — ingliz tilini ravon o'rganish.
words.example2: The team scored two goals in the match.
words.example3: Setting goals helps you stay motivated.
words.example3Translation: Maqsad qo'yish sizni rag'batlantirishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: What is your main goal in life?
He missed the goal by a few centimeters.
extraExampleTranslations: U golni bir necha santimetrga o'tkazib yubordi.

words.definition: A number of people or things together.
words.definitionUz: Birga bo'lgan odamlar yoki narsalar to'plami.
words.example1: We traveled in a small group.
words.example1Translation: Biz kichik guruh bo'lib sayohat qildik.
words.example3: The teacher divided the class into groups.
extraExamples: A group of friends met at the cafe.
This music group is very popular.
We work as a group on this project.
The group photo was taken yesterday.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz bu loyiha ustida guruh bo'lib ishlaymiz.

words.definition: The feeling of being happy.
words.definitionUz: Baxtli bo'lish tuyg'usi.
words.example1: Money cannot buy happiness.
words.example3: Family brings me the most happiness.
words.example3Translation: Oila menga eng katta baxt beradi.
extraExamples: We wish you happiness and success.
The children's happiness made her happy.

words.definition: An empty space in a solid object.
words.definitionUz: Qattiq narsadagi bo'sh joy.
words.example1: There is a hole in my sock.
words.example2: The dog dug a big hole in the garden.
words.example3: He fell into a hole while walking.
extraExamples: The roof has a small hole.
She made a hole in the paper.
The mouse went into the hole.
We need to fill the hole in the road.

words.definition: Facts or knowledge about something.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa haqidagi faktlar yoki bilim.
words.example1: Can you give me more information about the job?
words.example1Translation: Ish haqida ko'proq ma'lumot bera olasizmi?
words.example3: I need some information about trains.
extraExamples: This book contains a lot of information.
He collected information for his research.

words.definition: A feeling of wanting to know or learn about something.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa haqida bilish yoki o'rganishga bo'lgan tuyg'u.
words.example1: She has a great interest in art.
words.example2: The book is of no interest to me.
words.example3: He showed interest in the new project.
extraExamples: She lost interest in the game.
Music is one of his interests.

words.definition: A request to attend an event.
words.definitionUz: Tadbirga kelish haqidagi so'rov.
words.example1: I received an invitation to the wedding.

words.definition: A piece of land surrounded by water.
words.definitionUz: Suv bilan o'ralgan yer parchasi.
words.example1: They spent their vacation on a beautiful island.
words.example2: This island is famous for its beaches.
words.example3: Many people live on small islands.
extraExamples: We took a boat to the island.
Hawaii is a group of islands.
The island has a rich history.

words.definition: A problem or important topic.
words.definitionUz: Muammo yoki muhim mavzu.
words.example1: We need to discuss this issue.
words.example1Translation: Biz bu masalani muhokama qilishimiz kerak.
words.example3: There is an issue with my phone.
extraExamples: Money is not the main issue.
The magazine has a new issue every month.
extraExampleTranslations: Jurnal har oy yangi sonini chiqaradi.

words.definition: Something funny that makes people laugh.
words.definitionUz: Odamlarni kuldiradigan kulgili narsa.
words.example1: He told a funny joke.
words.example3: It was just a joke, don't be angry.
extraExamples: She has a good sense of humor and tells great jokes.
He made a joke about the weather.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning hazil tuyg'usi yaxshi va zo'r hazillar aytadi.

words.definition: Information and understanding gained through learning.
words.definitionUz: O'qish orqali olingan ma'lumot va tushuncha.
words.example1: Knowledge is power.
words.example2: He has good knowledge of history.
words.example2Translation: Uning tarix bo'yicha yaxshi bilimi bor.
words.example3: She gained a lot of knowledge during the course.
words.example3Translation: U kurs davomida ko'p bilim oldi.
extraExamples: He has deep knowledge in this field.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning bu sohada chuqur bilimi bor.

words.definition: A piece of paper or tag with information on it.
words.definitionUz: Ma'lumot yozilgan qog'oz yoki yorliq.
words.example1: Read the label before using the medicine.
words.example3: She put a label on each box.
words.example3Translation: U har bir qutiga yozuv yopishtirdi.
extraExamples: The food label shows the ingredients.
Don't judge people by their labels.
We need new labels for the products.
The washing instructions are on the label.
extraExampleTranslations: Odamlar haqida yozuvlariga qarab hukm chiqarmang.

words.definition: A rule made by a government.
words.definitionUz: Hukumat tomonidan qabul qilingan qoida.
words.example1: You must follow the law.
words.example2: He is studying law at university.
words.example3: There is a new law about traffic.
words.example3Translation: Yo'l harakati haqida yangi qonun chiqdi.
extraExamples: Breaking the law can lead to punishment.
She works as a law teacher.
extraExampleTranslations: Qonunni buzish jazoga olib kelishi mumkin.

words.definition: The measurement of how long something is.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsaning qancha uzunligini o'lchash.
words.example1: What is the length of this table?
words.example2: The length of the movie is two hours.
words.example3: She cut her hair to shoulder length.
extraExamples: The length of the river is 500 km.
We measured the length and width.
The speech was of great length.
I like the length of this dress.

words.definition: A series of names, items, or numbers written down.
words.definitionUz: Yozib qo'yilgan nomlar, narsalar yoki raqamlar ketma-ketligi.
words.example1: I made a shopping list.
