words.example2: Her name is on the waiting list.
words.example3: Check the list before you leave.
extraExamples: He made a list of things to do.
Please add your name to the list.
This is my favorite song list.
extraExampleTranslations: U bajarilishi kerak bo'lgan ishlar ro'yxatini tuzdi.

words.definition: Success or good things happening by chance.
words.definitionUz: Tasodifan yuz beradigan muvaffaqiyat yoki yaxshi narsalar.
words.example1: Good luck on your exam!
words.example2: She had bad luck with the weather.
words.example3: I wish you luck in your new job.

words.definition: A device with moving parts that does a particular job.
words.definitionUz: Muayyan ishni bajaradigan harakatlanuvchi qismlarga ega qurilma.
words.example1: This washing machine is very efficient.
words.example1Translation: Bu kir yuvish mashinasi juda samarali.
extraExamples: The vending machine is out of order.
This machine can do many tasks.
The new machine is easy to use.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu mashina ko'p vazifalarni bajarishi mumkin.

words.definition: A publication with articles and pictures.
words.definitionUz: Maqolalar va rasmlar bilan chiqadigan nashr.
words.example1: She reads fashion magazines.
words.example2: I bought a new science magazine.
words.example2Translation: Men yangi ilm-fan jurnalini sotib oldim.
words.example3: This magazine comes out every month.
extraExamples: He writes articles for a sports magazine.
Where is the latest issue of the magazine?
She subscribed to an online magazine.
extraExampleTranslations: U sport jurnali uchun maqolalar yozadi.

words.definition: The legal union of two people as partners.
words.definitionUz: Ikki odamning qonuniy sherik sifatida birlashishi.
words.example1: Their marriage is very happy.
words.example3Translation: Nikoh sabr va muhabbatni talab qiladi.
extraExamples: The marriage took place in a church.
Early marriage is common in some cultures.
extraExampleTranslations: Ba'zi madaniyatlarda erta nikoh odatiy hol.

words.definition: Substance from which things are made.
words.definitionUz: Narsalar tayyorlanadigan modda.
words.example1: This dress is made of good material.
words.example3Translation: U pardalar uchun material sotib oldi.
extraExamples: What material is this made of?
Natural materials are better for the environment.

words.definition: The idea or sense that a word or thing represents.
words.definitionUz: So'z yoki narsaning ifodalaydigan g'oyasi yoki mazmuni.
words.example1: What is the meaning of this word?
words.example2: The gift has special meaning for her.
words.example2Translation: Bu sovg'a uning uchun maxsus ma'noga ega.
words.example3: Life has no meaning without love.
extraExamples: She explained the meaning of the story.
I don't understand the deeper meaning.

words.definition: A way to determine size or amount, or an action taken.
words.definitionUz: O'lcham yoki miqdorni aniqlash usuli yoki ko'riladigan choralar.
words.example1: We need to take measures to solve the problem.
words.example1Translation: Muammoni hal qilish uchun choralar ko'rishimiz kerak.
words.example3: This is a good measure of success.
extraExamples: Use a ruler to measure the length.

words.definition: A person who belongs to a group or organization.
words.definitionUz: Guruh yoki tashkilotga kiruvchi shaxs.
words.example1: She is a member of the tennis club.
words.example2: All family members came to the party.
words.example3: He became a member of the team last year.
words.example3Translation: U o'tgan yili jamoa a'zosiga aylandi.
extraExamples: I am a member of this gym.

words.definition: The ability to remember things or a thing remembered.
words.definitionUz: Narsalarni eslab qolish qobiliyati yoki esda qolgan narsa.
words.example1: I have a good memory for names.
words.example1Translation: Mening ismlarni eslab qolish xotiram yaxshi.
words.example2: We have happy memories of our childhood.
words.example3: The computer has 8 GB of memory.
extraExamples: She lost her memory after the accident.
This song brings back old memories.
Create good memories with your family.
He has a bad memory for dates.
extraExampleTranslations: U baxtsiz hodisadan keyin xotirasini yo'qotdi.

words.definition: A way of doing something.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani bajarish usuli.
words.example1: This is the best method to solve the problem.
words.example1Translation: Bu muammoni hal qilishning eng yaxshi usuli.
words.example2: She developed a new teaching method.
words.example2Translation: U yangi o'qitish usulini ishlab chiqdi.
words.example3: What method do you use to learn vocabulary?
words.example3Translation: Lug'atlarni o'rganish uchun qanday usuldan foydalanasiz?
extraExamples: He has his own method of working.

words.definition: A very short period of time.
words.definitionUz: Juda qisqa vaqt oralig'i.
words.example1: Wait a moment, please.
words.example2: It was the happiest moment of my life.
words.example2Translation: Bu mening hayotimdagi eng baxtli lahza edi.
words.example3: At that moment, the phone rang.
extraExamples: I'll be back in a moment.

words.definition: Information or warning about something.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa haqidagi ma'lumot yoki ogohlantirish.
words.example1: Did you see the notice on the board?
words.example2: The company gave short notice about the meeting.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniya yig'ilish haqida qisqa bildirish berdi.
words.example3: She put up a notice about the lost dog.
words.example3Translation: U yo'qolgan it haqida e'lon osib qo'ydi.
extraExamples: I received a notice from the bank.
Please take notice of the rules.

words.definition: A particular time when something happens.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa sodir bo'ladigan muayyan vaqt.
words.example1: We only wear suits on special occasions.
words.example1Translation: Biz faqat maxsus holatlarda kostyum kiyamiz.
words.example2: Her birthday was a happy occasion.
words.example2Translation: Uning tug'ilgan kuni baxtli voqea edi.
words.example3: This is not the right occasion to discuss it.
words.example3Translation: Buni muhokama qilish uchun to'g'ri fursat emas.
extraExamples: On this occasion, we want to thank everyone.
It was a great occasion for celebration.
She spoke on the occasion of the opening.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu bayram qilish uchun ajoyib voqea edi.

words.definition: A person's job or profession.
words.definitionUz: Insonning ishi yoki kasbi.
words.example1: What is your occupation?
extraExamples: She listed her occupation on the form.
Farming is the main occupation in this area.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu kasb maxsus ko'nikmalarni talab qiladi.

words.definition: A chance to do something.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani qilish imkoniyati.
words.example1: This is a great opportunity for you.
words.example3: She got the opportunity to study abroad.
words.example3Translation: U chet elda o'qish imkoniyatini oldi.
extraExamples: There are many opportunities in this city.
It was the opportunity of a lifetime.
We should create more opportunities for young people.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu umrda bir marta keladigan imkoniyat edi.
Biz yoshlar uchun ko'proq imkoniyatlar yaratishimiz kerak.

words.definition: The person who owns something.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsaning egasi bo'lgan shaxs.
words.example1: The owner of the car is my neighbor.
words.example2: She is the owner of a small cafe.
extraExamples: Who is the owner of this house?
The business owner made a speech.
The owner is responsible for the repairs.
He became the proud owner of a new phone.
extraExampleTranslations: U yangi telefonning mag'rur egasiga aylandi.

words.definition: One side of a sheet of paper in a book.
words.definitionUz: Kitobdagi bir varaqning bir tomoni.
words.example1: Please open your book to page 45.
words.example2: The article is on the first page.

words.definition: Two things that go together.
words.definitionUz: Bir-biriga mos keladigan ikkita narsa.
words.example1: I bought a new pair of shoes.
words.example1Translation: Men yangi juft tuflilar sotib oldim.
words.example2: She wears a pair of glasses.
extraExamples: A pair of scissors is on the table.
I need a new pair of socks.
This pair of earrings is beautiful.

words.definition: A piece or section of something larger.
words.definitionUz: Kattaroq narsaning bir bo'lagi yoki qismi.
words.example1: This is only part of the story.
words.example2: She played an important part in the project.
words.example3: Which part of the city do you live in?
extraExamples: We are part of a big family.
The best part of the trip was the beach.
He knows this subject very well, especially the difficult parts.
extraExampleTranslations: Sayohatning eng yaxshi qismi plyaj edi.
U bu fanini juda yaxshi biladi, ayniqsa qiyin qismlarini.

words.definition: A length of time or a full stop at the end of a sentence.
words.definitionUz: Period — ma’lum vaqt oralig‘i yoki jumla oxiridagi nuqta.
words.example1: We lived in Spain for a short period.
words.example2: The exam period is very stressful.
words.example3: Put a period at the end of the sentence.
extraExamples: The company had a difficult period last year.
She is in her final period of study.
This is the best period of my life.
The meeting lasted for a long period.
We are going through a transition period.
The history period covers many events.
A period of peace followed the war.
extraExampleTranslations: Kompaniya o‘tgan yili qiyin davrni boshdan kechirdi.
Bu mening hayotimdagi eng yaxshi davr.
Tarix davri ko‘p voqealarni qamrab oladi.

words.definition: A feeling of happiness or enjoyment.
words.definitionUz: Pleasure — baxt yoki zavq hissi.
words.example1: It was a pleasure to meet you.
words.example2: She takes pleasure in helping others.
words.example2Translation: U boshqalarga yordam berishdan zavq oladi.
words.example3: Reading books gives me great pleasure.
words.example3Translation: Kitob o‘qish menga katta zavq beradi.
extraExamples: The pleasure of traveling is unforgettable.
He finds pleasure in simple things.
It's my pleasure to help you.
Music brings pleasure to many people.
We had a lot of pleasure at the party.
extraExampleTranslations: Sizga yordam berish men uchun zavq.

words.definition: A small bag sewn into clothing for carrying small items.
words.definitionUz: Pocket — kiyimda mayda narsalarni solish uchun tikilgan cho‘ntak.
words.example1: He put the keys in his pocket.
words.example2: There is a hole in my pocket.
words.example3: She keeps her phone in her back pocket.
extraExamples: I have some money in my pocket.
He reached into his pocket for a pen.
She bought a jacket with many pockets.
Don't put your hands in your pockets.
The thief took everything from his pocket.
This shirt has a chest pocket.
extraExampleTranslations: U ko‘p cho‘ntakli kurtka sotib oldi.
O‘g‘ri uning cho‘ntagidagi hamma narsani olib ketdi.

words.definition: A job or the way someone or something is placed.
words.definitionUz: Position — ish lavozimi yoki biror narsaning joylashuvi.
words.example1: She applied for a manager position.
words.example2: The car is in a good position.
words.example3: What is your position on this issue?
extraExamples: He got a new position in the company.
The team is in first position.
The hotel is in a central position.
I am not in a position to help right now.
The company is in a strong financial position.

words.definition: A job or a message on social media.
words.definitionUz: Post — ish lavozimi yoki ijtimoiy tarmoqlardagi xabar.
words.example1: He applied for the post of teacher.
words.example2: She wrote a nice post on Facebook.
extraExamples: There is a new post available.
He holds a high post in the government.
The company announced the post online.

words.definition: The cause or explanation for something.
words.definitionUz: Reason — biror narsaning sababi yoki tushuntirishi.
words.example1: What is the reason for your visit?
words.example2: There is no reason to be angry.
extraExamples: The main reason is lack of time.
For some reason, I feel happy.
What is your reason for choosing this?
There are many reasons to study hard.
The reason behind the problem is clear.
extraExampleTranslations: Nima uchundir o‘zimni baxtli his qilyapman.

words.definition: The outcome or effect of an action.
words.definitionUz: Result — biror harakatning natijasi yoki ta’siri.
words.example1: The results of the exam are good.
words.example3: We are waiting for the test results.
extraExamples: What was the result of the match?
The results will be announced tomorrow.
He is happy with the result.

words.definition: The function or part that someone or something has.
words.definitionUz: Role — biror odam yoki narsaning vazifasi yoki qismi.
words.example1: She played an important role in the project.
words.example2: Parents have a big role in education.
words.example3: What is your role in the company?
extraExamples: He has a leading role in the team.
Technology plays a major role in our life.
She got a small role in the movie.
The teacher's role is very responsible.
Climate change plays a key role in global issues.
extraExampleTranslations: Iqlim o‘zgarishi global muammolarda asosiy rol o‘ynaydi.
U rolni mamnuniyat bilan qabul qildi.

words.definition: The state of being protected from danger.
words.definitionUz: Safety — xavfdan himoyalangan holat.
words.example1: Road safety is very important.
words.example2: Wear a helmet for your safety.
words.example3: The company cares about worker safety.
extraExamples: She felt a sense of safety at home.
The building has high safety standards.
Check the safety of the equipment.

words.definition: A part of a play, movie, or a view of a place.
words.definitionUz: Scene — film yoki pyesaning bir qismi yoki biror joyning manzarasi.
words.example1: The movie has a beautiful beach scene.
words.example2: She cried in the last scene.
extraExamples: It was a peaceful village scene.
She painted a beautiful winter scene.

words.definition: A separate part of something larger.
words.definitionUz: Section — kattaroq narsaning alohida bo‘limi.
words.example1: Read the first section of the book.
extraExamples: Please go to the next section.
The music section is on the second floor.
Divide the class into small sections.
She works in the marketing section.
The newspaper has a sports section.

words.definition: Help or work done for customers.
words.definitionUz: Service — mijozlarga ko‘rsatiladigan yordam yoki ish.
words.example1: The service in this restaurant is excellent.
extraExamples: Public service is a noble job.
She works in the customer service department.
extraExampleTranslations: U mijozlarga xizmat ko‘rsatish bo‘limida ishlaydi.
Yaxshi xizmat ko‘proq mijoz olib keladi.

words.definition: The conditions or circumstances at a particular time.
words.definitionUz: Situation — ma’lum vaqtdagi holat yoki sharoitlar.
words.example1: The situation is getting better.
words.example2: We are in a difficult situation.
extraExamples: The situation at home is calm.

words.definition: How big or small something is.
words.definitionUz: Size — biror narsaning katta yoki kichikligi.
words.example1: What size shoes do you wear?
words.example2: The size of the room is perfect.
words.example3: This shirt is the wrong size.
extraExamples: The company is increasing in size.
The size of the problem is big.
The city is growing in size.

words.definition: A large group of people living together in a community.
words.definitionUz: Society — bir jamiyatda yashaydigan katta odamlar guruhi.
words.example1: We live in a modern society.
words.example3: The role of women in society is changing.
extraExamples: He works for the benefit of society.
She is a member of a music society.

words.definition: A way to solve a problem.
words.definitionUz: Solution — muammoni hal qilish yo‘li.
words.example1: We need a quick solution.
extraExamples: The best solution is to work together.
We are looking for a long-term solution.

words.definition: A formal talk given to an audience.
words.definitionUz: Speech — auditoriya oldida so‘zlangan rasmiy nutq.
words.example1: He gave a great speech at the conference.
extraExamples: I get nervous before giving a speech.
She received applause for her speech.
The opening speech was very good.

words.definition: How fast something moves or happens.
words.definitionUz: Speed — biror narsaning harakat tezligi yoki sodir bo‘lish tezligi.
words.example1: The car was driving at high speed.
words.example3: The speed of the internet is slow.
extraExamples: Reduce your speed in the city.
We need to increase the speed of development.

words.definition: The achievement of a goal.
words.definitionUz: Success — maqsadga erishish.
words.example1: Hard work leads to success.
words.example2: She achieved great success in her career.
extraExamples: The project was a big success.
What is your definition of success?

words.definition: A period of time or a word with a special meaning.
words.definitionUz: Term — ma’lum muddat yoki maxsus ma’noga ega so‘z.
words.example1: The school term ends in June.
words.example3: He signed a two-year term contract.
words.example3Translation: U ikki yillik muddatli shartnoma imzoladi.
extraExamples: The president's term is four years.
In the long term, it will be better.
The term of payment is 30 days.

words.definition: An idea or opinion in your mind.
words.definitionUz: Thought — ongda paydo bo‘ladigan fikr yoki g‘oya.
words.example1: I had a good thought about the project.
words.example1Translation: Loyiha haqida yaxshi fikr paydo bo‘ldi.
words.example2: She shared her thoughts with us.
words.example2Translation: U fikrlarini biz bilan baham ko‘rdi.
words.example3: The thought of traveling makes me happy.
extraExamples: Deep thoughts help us understand life.
I lost my train of thought.
extraExampleTranslations: Chuqur fikrlar hayotni tushunishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: The subject of a discussion, speech, or writing.
words.definitionUz: Topic — suhbat, nutq yoki yozuvning asosiy mavzusi.
words.example1: The topic of the meeting was education.
words.example2: Choose an interesting topic for your essay.
extraExamples: The main topic is climate change.
She spoke on the topic of health.
The teacher gave us a topic.

words.definition: A custom or belief passed from one generation to another.
words.definitionUz: Tradition — avlodlardan avlodlarga o‘tib kelayotgan odat yoki e’tiqod.
words.example1: It is our family tradition to celebrate Navruz.
extraExamples: Wedding traditions differ in every culture.
Eating plov is a Uzbek tradition.
extraExampleTranslations: To‘y an’analari har bir madaniyatda farq qiladi.

words.definition: A problem or difficulty.
words.definitionUz: Trouble — muammo yoki qiyinchilik.
words.example1: I am having trouble with my phone.
words.example2: She got into trouble at school.
extraExamples: We had some trouble with the car.
She helped me when I was in trouble.

words.definition: A category or kind of something.
words.definitionUz: Type — biror narsaning turi yoki turi.
words.example1: What type of music do you like?
words.example2: There are many types of fruits.
words.example3: This is a new type of phone.
extraExamples: She is the type of person who helps others.
I don't like this type of movie.
Choose the right type of shoes.
There are various types of jobs.
What type of food do you prefer?
extraExampleTranslations: U boshqalarga yordam beradigan odam turi.

words.definition: The importance or usefulness of something.
words.definitionUz: Value — biror narsaning ahamiyati yoki foydaliligi.
words.example1: Family has great value in our culture.
words.example2: The value of education is high.
extraExamples: The company added value to the product.
What is the value of this painting?
She places great value on honesty.
The value of the car decreased.

words.definition: What you can see from a place or your opinion.
words.definitionUz: View — biror joydan ko‘rinadigan manzara yoki shaxsiy fikr.
words.example1: The view from the mountain is beautiful.
words.example2: What is your view on this matter?
extraExamples: In my view, it is wrong.
The hotel has a great view.
The view changed after the meeting.

words.definition: The sound made by a person when speaking or singing.
words.definitionUz: Voice — gapirganda yoki qo‘shiq aytganda chiqadigan ovoz.
words.example1: She has a beautiful voice.
words.example2: Please speak in a loud voice.
extraExamples: He lost his voice after shouting.
The singer has a powerful voice.
Raise your voice if you can't hear.
We heard voices from the next room.
The teacher has a clear voice.

words.definition: How heavy something is.
words.definitionUz: Weight — biror narsaning og‘irligi.
words.example1: What is your weight?
words.example3: The weight of the box is 10 kg.
extraExamples: He is trying to gain weight.
She checks her weight every week.
The doctor advised her to reduce weight.
This bag has a lot of weight.
extraExampleTranslations: Shifokor unga vazn tashlashni maslahat berdi.

words.definition: A desire for something to happen.
words.definitionUz: Wish — biror narsaning sodir bo‘lishini istash.
words.example1: I wish you a happy birthday.
words.example2: She wishes to travel the world.
words.example2Translation: U dunyo bo‘ylab sayohat qilishni orzu qiladi.

words.definition: To have the same opinion as someone.
words.definitionUz: I agree — birovning fikri bilan bir xil fikrda bo‘lish.
words.example1: I agree with your idea.
words.example3: I agree that we should start early.
extraExamples: Most people agree on this point.
I completely agree with the decision.

words.definition: To have a different opinion.
words.definitionUz: I disagree — boshqacha fikrda bo‘lish.
words.example1: I disagree with that plan.
words.example3: Many people disagree with this idea.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘p odamlar bu fikr bilan rozi emas.
extraExamples: I disagree because it is too expensive.
extraExampleTranslations: Men rozi emasman, chunki juda qimmat.

words.definition: Used to introduce your personal view.
words.definitionUz: In my opinion — shaxsiy fikringizni bildirish uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: In my opinion, this is the best choice.
words.example1Translation: Mening fikrimcha, bu eng yaxshi tanlov.
words.example2: In my opinion, we should wait.
words.example3: In my opinion, the movie was boring.
extraExamples: In my opinion, education is very important.
In my opinion, it's too late.
In my opinion, she is right.
In my opinion, we need to change.
In my opinion, the price is high.
In my opinion, this is correct.

words.definition: Used to express your belief or opinion.
words.definitionUz: I think that — o‘z e’tiqodingiz yoki fikringizni bildirish uchun.
words.example1: I think that we should go now.
words.example2: I think that this is a good idea.
words.example3: I think that she is right.
extraExamples: I think that it will rain tomorrow.
I think that you are correct.
I think that we need more time.
I think that the movie is great.
I think that he will come.
I think that it is possible.

words.definition: To like one thing more than another.
words.definitionUz: I prefer — bir narsani ikkinchisidan ko‘ra yaxshi ko‘rish.
words.example1: I prefer tea to coffee.
words.example1Translation: Men qahvadan ko‘ra choyni afzal ko‘raman.
words.example2: I prefer to stay at home.
extraExamples: I prefer to travel by train.
extraExampleTranslations: Men qishdan ko‘ra yozni afzal ko‘raman.
Men yugurishdan ko‘ra yurishni afzal ko‘raman.
Men poezdda sayohat qilishni afzal ko‘raman.

words.definition: Used to ask someone's opinion.
words.definitionUz: What do you think — birovning fikrini so‘rash uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: What do you think about this plan?
words.example1Translation: Bu reja haqida nima deb o‘ylaysiz?
words.example2: What do you think we should do?
words.example3: What do you think of the movie?
extraExamples: What do you think is the best option?
What do you think about the new teacher?
Tell me, what do you think?
What do you think about climate change?
What do you think we should eat?
What do you think of my new dress?
extraExampleTranslations: Eng yaxshi variant nima deb o‘ylaysiz?
Yangi o‘qituvchi haqida nima deb o‘ylaysiz?
Iqlim o‘zgarishi haqida nima deb o‘ylaysiz?
Yangi ko‘ylagim haqida nima deb o‘ylaysiz?

words.definition: A polite way to offer assistance.
words.definitionUz: Can I help you — muloyim tarzda yordam taklif qilish.
words.example1: Can I help you with your bags?
words.example3: Can I help you find something?
words.example3Translation: Biror narsa topishda yordam bersam bo‘ladimi?
extraExamples: Can I help you with your homework?
Can I help you carry that?
How can I help you today?
Can I help you choose a gift?
Can I help you with the cooking?
Let me know if I can help you.
extraExampleTranslations: Bugun sizga qanday yordam bera olaman?
U "Sizga yordam bersam bo‘ladimi?" deb so‘radi.

words.definition: A polite way to say what you want.
words.definitionUz: I'd like to — muloyim tarzda nimani xohlayotganingizni aytish.
words.example1: I'd like to order coffee.
words.example2: I'd like to speak to the manager.
extraExamples: I'd like to make a reservation.
I'd like to buy this one.
I'd like to ask a question.
I'd like to go home now.

words.definition: Used to ask the price of something.
words.definitionUz: How much is it — biror narsaning narxini so‘rash uchun.
words.example1: How much is it?
words.example3: Excuse me, how much is this shirt?
extraExamples: How much is it per person?
Can you tell me how much it is?
How much is it in dollars?

words.definition: Used when you are uncertain about something.
words.definitionUz: I'm not sure — biror narsaga ishonchingiz komil bo‘lmaganda ishlatiladi.
words.example1: I'm not sure about the answer.
words.example2: I'm not sure if I can come.
words.example3: I'm not sure what to do.
extraExamples: I'm not sure about the time.
I'm not sure where he is.
I'm not sure if it's correct.
I'm not sure how to do it.
I'm not sure, but I think yes.
I'm not sure about my decision.
extraExampleTranslations: Amin emasman, lekin ha deb o‘ylayman.
